I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4696b3c107ad4b5696078b364240d81e&_e=z65KJbYy7K0AJ4rm0gm1Vb1Gxhh89f6-ioRJcm1TuHyti4VbEaLXW9UIooLpcPiOeqkHDOxpNzk4C-omQwz0Uyn2G6CsqvoKeuS68vLNpftMPpG6ObNAwh0llQFAeo2anNmbGhirUFqyomrshdNFtKFI3G3kyNzrIh4OYcszAVKW15vWOMtZTP2eiGbdMMGcbqvLmvIS42-ZQu_Iga3jYnTpax_rfmEGvReGnQay4YcTjAcEGMO8o7fu67wwEAl_Lqndatpjp4jLojuNf2kle8Pr4JIKLJQXwpNGpFvowpwNT_O60Co5Gfm63KnCbpRR)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4696b3c107ad4b5696078b364240d81e&_e=z65KJbYy7K0AJ4rm0gm1Vb1Gxhh89f6-ioRJcm1TuHyti4VbEaLXW9UIooLpcPiOeqkHDOxpNzk4C-omQwz0Uyn2G6CsqvoKeuS68vLNpftMPpG6ObNAwh0llQFAeo2anNmbGhirUFqyomrshdNFtKFI3G3kyNzrIh4OYcszAVIXlj0rJp5pmlJumuPGOg3OLWi3YzkersVsVLivb0uOy38xOt5gRDIrbRTjt4cd5QGdnFgKKAbaNOcmB88F9HaPcyfibRJ5KI5LXPgPNcwI_2o_kcOU1bcnXMScIQmb_4ewN8j1SFdEGkpFuL1KCZTf)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

subject: Waffle House [CLICK TO WATCH]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020068:6eD6CEGNj:m:1:3253819041:A08F6F2C710DC347C67BC7649E53778A:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020068:6eD6CEGNj:m:1:3253819041:A08F6F2C710DC347C67BC7649E53778A:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020068:6eD6CEGNj:m:1:3253819041:A08F6F2C710DC347C67BC7649E53778A:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in $25, $30, or even $34 for #34.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020068:6eD6CEGNj:m:1:3253819041:A08F6F2C710DC347C67BC7649E53778A:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020068:6eD6CEGNj:m:1:3253819041:A08F6F2C710DC347C67BC7649E53778A:r)

Lindsey Graham

subject: Will you personally endorse Raphael Warnock?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We’re beyond proud to be supporting Raphael Warnock's re-election campaign. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55523048/381975114/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_endorse_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmMzMjY2Mi1lZjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZPBGQxBb9aHCemPX4TjlDGjVEhQYFdV8vHC4wAnVU0=&emci=730c195c-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=22c32662-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)

| | Folks, We’re beyond proud to be supporting Senator Raphael Warnock's re-election campaign. For the past two years he has shown up every day for the people of Georgia — and will continue to do so. He’s committed to fighting for our fundamental rights — from protecting the freedom to vote to restoring reproductive rights. And he has secured lower prescription drug costs and delivered billions of dollars in relief to help Americans who need it most. **We need to keep him in the U.S. Senate. But the future of Georgia and the strength of our Democratic majority is on the line in this Runoff Election that’s happening right now.** **[With just a few days left until Georgians choose their next U.S. senator, will you add your name to personally endorse Sen. Warnock for re-election? An outpouring of endorsements will prove that he has widespread support in this election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55523049/381975115/1344171825?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_endorse_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmMzMjY2Mi1lZjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZPBGQxBb9aHCemPX4TjlDGjVEhQYFdV8vHC4wAnVU0=&emci=730c195c-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=22c32662-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55523050/381975116/1344171825?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_endorse_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmMzMjY2Mi1lZjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZPBGQxBb9aHCemPX4TjlDGjVEhQYFdV8vHC4wAnVU0=&emci=730c195c-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=22c32662-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)
---
Sen. Warnock is a champion for people who most need their voices to be heard in Washington. He grew up in public housing in Savannah, Georgia, the son of Pentecostal preachers and the eleventh of twelve children. And his working-class upbringing inspires him to put hardworking Georgians first.
But the latest polls show Sen. Warnock neck-and-neck with his opponent Herschel Walker, who wants to undo all the progress Georgia has seen and advance an anti-democracy agenda in the U.S. Senate. Sen. Warnock can continue to deliver real progress for Americans, but that depends on whether or not we show up in record-breaking numbers to re-elect him for another six years.
**[We have just two days to go before the polls close. Please add your personal endorsement if you agree we need to send Sen. Warnock back to the U.S. Senate, and show the full strength of his grassroots support across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55523051/381975117/1344171825?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_endorse_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmMzMjY2Mi1lZjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZPBGQxBb9aHCemPX4TjlDGjVEhQYFdV8vHC4wAnVU0=&emci=730c195c-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=22c32662-ef73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)**

body:
The Democrats have renewed their push to expand the number of states in our Union, and we all know why.

| |
---
| | | Friend,
_**We need just a minute of your time for a quick question:**_

---

---

_**The Democrats have renewed their push to expand the number of states in our Union, and we all know why.**_ _With statehood comes more representation; for a district that has voted blue since its inception, there is no doubt it's an effort to pass their radical agenda._

That's why we're requesting your response Friend - we need to shore up support to stand against the Radical Left's push to expand their hold on power in Washington.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A simple request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority.
|
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2dg0gl80g72gghlken4n5r9i2iko3nq8jr87l20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn6mr0v74jms2f7mug1kgoos262jl9v2rjujtf80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh05e8qnuucqgp3ch2piooictgeej356fovpa0e8_)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs9ne1a3amb43ts91lss3ctdhjapde1ff2j5a02o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zujdvjp6chgb2fnif7i1r3qtof02dbdhdcldpv98_)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgkd2277hg85pd27hetbvuvc2l6vmphst5v2d6f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpsq2pv791o2ber4o0o2qvf6n2f45amlsgb6tte0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zafcjcb5tp1555ir7ev8dgsl84uds66ndni546ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk1t1g2uk97vktedvi6a2ubt56phedvu6fkd6f9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpjqnba25fthu47lo6rjgglogo8fa426v2404bho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb5eslla6iq2tmqnte82q81r9qh58l3u5vrk50fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjgrghpdt3uloui1jknan5nufium1fe7pnrjtogg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfc5k8e07q16e3t3rjsfdj9ih7oaknfqnfjsbgp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0chjm8ob4c3h2bs)

name: Casey Given
subject: VIDEO messages inside for you, Peter
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015291:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
Hello Peter,

I'm on a mission to tell 100,000 high school students about the horrors of authoritarian socialism.

We've already gone to several high schools this semester, and it's been a huge success.

This is a subject that students don't learn about in the classroom.

These stories are more powerful than any movie or book could portray.

That's why I've set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the year to send our speakers to 50 schools.

[_**Peter, I am humbly asking you to help reach this goal with a gift of any amount. Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015291:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)

I want to share a little bit of what students will be hearing from our speakers, so I've included a video message from Grace Jo, Frances Hui, and Daniel Di Martino.

**GRACE JO**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015291:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)

Grace was born in North Korea, where she almost starved to death as a child.

There, most of her family die of starvation, including her father, who was also tortured in jail because he left the country to find food for his family. One of Grace's older sisters went missing in China while she was searching for food to bring back. She was probably sold into human trafficking.

Grace, her mother, and one sister tried to escape North Korea many times but were repatriated, imprisoned, and tortured.

In 2006, when Pastor Philip Buck bribed North Korean agents, Grace and her two remaining family members finally escaped. **Grace moved to America in 2008 and became one of 370 refugees from North Korea.**

[_**Help Grace and our other speakers share their experiences with more high school students this year. Click here to send a gift to the Dissident Project today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015291:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)

**FRANCES HUI**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015292:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)

**Frances Hui is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America. **

At the early age of 13, Hui started her involvement in Hong Kong's social movements. She was a former standing committee member of Scholarism and a campaigner for multiple pro-democracy candidates in Hong Kong.

Hui's column, _" I am from Hong Kong, not China,"_ was featured by many international media outlets and was a widespread piece across the globe.

Currently based in the US, she heads the organization, We The Hongkongers, as the director dedicated to promoting and strengthening the culture and identity of Hongkongers abroad.

[_**If you share our mission of educating high school students on the dangers of communism, can you send a gift of any amount? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015292:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)

**DANIEL DI MARTINO**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015293:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)

**Daniel Di Martino is the founder of the Dissident Project.**

Born and raised in Venezuela, Di Martino experienced the terrible consequences of socialism firsthand. His family lost everything as hyperinflation made money worthless.

After leaving Venezuela for the United States in 2016, he dedicated himself to explaining how socialism destroyed his homeland, advocating for freedom, and stopping this ideology from ever being implemented in America and elsewhere.

Daniel has appeared dozens of times on national TV channels such as Fox News and CNN, written for the USA Today, National Review, and other news outlets, and regularly speaks at college campuses and events all over the country.

**Our speakers remind high school students that authoritarian socialism isn 't a thing of the past. Each of them has lived through it! **

I hope you can see the importance of the Dissident Project, Peter.

That's why we're raising $50,000 to send our speakers to 50 schools and connect with students. **Click below to send your gift. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015294:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015295:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015296:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015297:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015298:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015299:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015300:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015291:JyuDCEGNK:m:1:3317145305:721BA99B1245A795CBF6E20C7EBF6881:r)

Thank you,

Casey Given

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

Daniel has appeared dozens of times on national TV channels such as Fox News and CNN, written for the USA Today, National Review, and other news outlets, and regularly speaks at college campuses and events all over the country. Our speakers remind high school students that authoritarian socialism isn 't a thing of the past. Each of them has lived through it! I hope you can see the importance of the Dissident Project, Peter. That's why we're raising $50,000 to send our speakers to 50 schools and connect with students. Click below to send your gift. Thank you, Casey Given The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014840:68-cCEGN2:m:1:3331703221:FDAE040F8FC439ACFD0B29C0040E7B6C:r)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014840:68-cCEGN2:m:1:3331703221:FDAE040F8FC439ACFD0B29C0040E7B6C:r) Hi Peter,

[Please chip in IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014840:68-cCEGN2:m:1:3331703221:FDAE040F8FC439ACFD0B29C0040E7B6C:r)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake.)

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What 's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach 's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Peter, that 's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** "They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Peter, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift RIGHT NOW.
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014840:68-cCEGN2:m:1:3331703221:FDAE040F8FC439ACFD0B29C0040E7B6C:r)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Peter, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014840:68-cCEGN2:m:1:3331703221:FDAE040F8FC439ACFD0B29C0040E7B6C:r)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a13648333db8498bb7de2a2c63260817&_e=k28lb9cUtp6XtRtbsvgqj9THxNKpv4tc_lBwo5Juj6HhoVdY1MB5uKbqAMfBRBzHuS3UIkXFor8gLHIy00ImQ3xbEJ-bs_FLnVM6Zv0HbAxMIBTO20TFzO2oTxf8OPBnsVayyqUL0cMztF7Z5OkhzrxH44XcvM0exUIP3rbst76LXto5d-RuonFbIpvQ9XLlN-cha1xuSIFoLmKB-NQiaiasfMN83aaOdyLPvgfhEUb4DCNq5YzKg01V5KNqsoX4) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a13648333db8498bb7de2a2c63260817&_e=k28lb9cUtp6XtRtbsvgqj9THxNKpv4tc_lBwo5Juj6HhoVdY1MB5uKbqAMfBRBzHuS3UIkXFor8gLHIy00ImQ3xbEJ-bs_FLnVM6Zv0HbAwfCeW9Wkkeb1rtNomtv4vsGYaLz-80u_GEXBlUDIAskzeOUYHV5p57nfUL-188yExIaAL10RW2EoWCBhCLldmPHQWclSriXnj3uS_cxFdCSr8EC11Ycg5m8YcyKo91q3GlkDqJqK3bep8UJvEyfv7T) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a13648333db8498bb7de2a2c63260817&_e=k28lb9cUtp6XtRtbsvgqj9THxNKpv4tc_lBwo5Juj6HhoVdY1MB5uKbqAMfBRBzHuS3UIkXFor8gLHIy00ImQ3xbEJ-bs_FLnVM6Zv0HbAwuRJL1zbouH8XRexYnYsCUb1XqptFvEgQP5ayv20WmEdo1S9TdHeAg_5i-BsOLXB2jn3b7JMNxzz_zp23BLIVpfmldM5-5AnJ2H2g71-EaQc-M2h0ljZeXHO3DvV8JYSgGiupx4OmIGuzRDEplN2P9) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a13648333db8498bb7de2a2c63260817&_e=k28lb9cUtp6XtRtbsvgqj9THxNKpv4tc_lBwo5Juj6HhoVdY1MB5uKbqAMfBRBzHuS3UIkXFor8gLHIy00ImQ3xbEJ-bs_FLnVM6Zv0HbAyA4hHL7GMzjFZKH6B2bXmHgy_2nt9AIKLjaRZdQWjKQMMVW7CO7f7Dc_VSQxlM1EvmyAZtLV18C16-zF3y3jujcpj54i8qn277SnmkQTeYHH2Jy6cwmNai39JukWICq1pVdEa5NNMA0P9Y6Oe6nqFf) Regards, Maria Bonaventura

name: Latinos for Herschel
subject: Even President Trump Noticed our efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Latinos for America First**
body:
So much is at stake--it's a national emergency!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015287:JYS-YEGUN:m:1:3331421248:FAECFC6961FA2577F103105A511CAAA8:r "Headline") Peter: We've been in Georgia since last Monday helping Herschel win his runoff. But I wanted to send you a quick note. This year's election marked a milestone for Latino voters, especially those who chose to vote Republican. For many, it was their first time registered as a GOP voter, and like you, I'm disappointed it wasn't enough to deliver the Red Wave as hoped. But we have a choice to make - **sulk ... or do something about it.** Well, our organization is doing something about it! Herschel saw a huge turnout of support from the Latino voters in Georgia and we need to make sure they vote for the GOP candidate on December 6th! **[Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your donation today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015287:JYS-YEGUN:m:1:3331421248:FAECFC6961FA2577F103105A511CAAA8:r "Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your $25, $50,
or $100 donation today!")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015287:JYS-YEGUN:m:1:3331421248:FAECFC6961FA2577F103105A511CAAA8:r "Sign")Latinos for America First is all-in for the Georgia runoff!
* We're putting volunteers on the ground to walk Latino neighborhoods. In fact, we've already knocked over 1,000 doors!
* We're buying digital ads that target Georgia's Latino voters and are looking to place ads on the local Hispanic stations as well.
* Most importantly, we're ramping up our Get-Out-The-Vote program to make sure these Latino voters show up to vote for Herschel on December 6th!

**All of this takes money ... and money that we don't have.** $76,276.87 to be exact if we're going to have any chance to fully fund our run-off program **We saw how our efforts in the Latino communities made an impact for GOP candidates across the country. Even President Trump remarked in his 2024 campaign announcement of the huge gains the GOP made in the Latino community during this election.** These efforts take money and if we're going to turn out the Latino voters for Herschel on December 6th, we need to have your support NOW. **[Will you help us today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015287:JYS-YEGUN:m:1:3331421248:FAECFC6961FA2577F103105A511CAAA8:r "Will you help us today?")** | | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015288:JYS-YEGUN:m:1:3331421248:FAECFC6961FA2577F103105A511CAAA8:r "CHIP IN $50")
---
| [CHIP IN $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015289:JYS-YEGUN:m:1:3331421248:FAECFC6961FA2577F103105A511CAAA8:r "CHIP IN $100")
---

So much is at stake--it's a national emergency. We can't let the Democrats gain the majority in the Senate and continue to push for abortion-on-demand, same-sex marriage, defunding the police, or continuing their socialist economic policies that caused inflation and high interest rates.
Help us push Herschel to victory by making sure the Latino voters show up and vote Red. **[Donate today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015287:JYS-YEGUN:m:1:3331421248:FAECFC6961FA2577F103105A511CAAA8:r "Donate today!")**
For America,
Bianca Gracia
Founder
Latinos for America First PAC

name: (2) Penny, Steve Scalise
subject: Our next Majority Leader wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hi Peter,
This is Penny with Republican HQ.
Our next Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, emailed you earlier but you never responded. He's looking for individual input from Patriots we can trust.
_You 're at the top of our list!_
**[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014183:6PKKYEGBN:m:1:3253819041:CD2017FA7E636A62F1FD7F0735BCFBC1:r)**
Republican leaders don't have much time until their playbook for the 2023 Congressional session is locked in. **Consider this your last and final chance to provide critical feedback to Congressional leaders.**
This is the first time Republicans have been in control of the House in FOUR years! Leaders like Steve Scalise want to make sure House Republicans start off on the right foot, so your feedback is critical to know where to begin.
[**Can you please take just a moment to complete Steve Scalise 's Majority Leader Survey now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014184:6PKKYEGBN:m:1:3253819041:CD2017FA7E636A62F1FD7F0735BCFBC1:r)
Thank you,
Penny
Republican HQ
_P.S. If you missed Steve 's earlier message, I've attached it below for your convenience. _
_\--------------------- (1) Missed Message from Steve Scalise ---------------------_
Subject: Help me help you?
**Hi Peter -- It 's Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I'm looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you're someone I know I can trust.
[**Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014183:6PKKYEGBN:m:1:3253819041:CD2017FA7E636A62F1FD7F0735BCFBC1:r)
**Here 's some of the things I need advice on:**
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on stopping Critical Race Theory in Schools?_
_Should a Republican Congress COMPLETE the Southern Border Wall?_
**[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014183:6PKKYEGBN:m:1:3253819041:CD2017FA7E636A62F1FD7F0735BCFBC1:r)**
Time is of the essence. Republican leaders like myself only have a few more days to put together our playbook of ideas for the upcoming Congressional session.
_In other words: help me help you!_
[**Please, take just 2 minutes to answer some of the most important questions I 've ever asked you before I meet with my top colleagues and Team Scalise to review your responses.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014183:6PKKYEGBN:m:1:3253819041:CD2017FA7E636A62F1FD7F0735BCFBC1:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014183:6PKKYEGBN:m:1:3253819041:CD2017FA7E636A62F1FD7F0735BCFBC1:r)
**Steve Scalise**
_Republican Majority Leader-elect_

Peter: Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_
**[Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014697:6mm0YEGNv:m:1:3317145305:A725EF845DCE0D7998FF7BCF74DBB256:r)**
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: _**conservative principles and us.**_
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?
▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?
▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?
▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?
▶︎ To secure our border?
▶︎ To clean up our streets?
**[Please chip in to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014697:6mm0YEGNv:m:1:3317145305:A725EF845DCE0D7998FF7BCF74DBB256:r)**
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates. Sincerely,

Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund

name: Jessi Melton, Parental Rights Advocate
subject: Who’s behind the increase in kids with gender confusion?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014214:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
Peter,

Did you know that there has been a staggering increase in students that identify as _" gender nonconforming"_?

In the largest and most affluent public school district in Maryland, there's been **a 582% increase since last school year. . .**

During the 2019-2020 school year, 35 students told that school district that they identified as 'gender nonconforming.'

_**Now, a total of 239 students reported that they were gender nonconforming.**_

And 45% of these students considered themselves "non-binary."

The increase in LGBT kids is no coincidence. Institutional forces, like the corrupt Teachers Union, are behind this destructive movement.

And they MUST be stopped!

I'm Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA). We're working with America-First candidates and organizations to keep politicians and Federal institutions from indoctrinating our children.

[_**But we can 't do it alone. Can you show your support by donating $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014214:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)

The pressure on our children is coming from all sides.

From the White House -- _**the Biden Administration threatened to withhold lunch funding to public schools that wanted to keep bathrooms separated by biological sex.**_

From Federal entities like the Department of Health & Human Services, the Justice Department, and the Center for Disease Control (CDC) -- _**Recently, the CDC allocated $85 MILLION to pressure schools to adopt LGBT groups.**_

From hospitals and medical associations -- _**The American Medical Association has lobbied to INCREASE sex-change treatment on children in many states.**_

From school board and Teachers Unions -- _**two teachers in Spreckels, California, stalked students online during school hours to recruit them to the school 's LGBTQ+ club.**_

[_**Will you stand up for the rights of parents and keep our children from being indoctrinated?**__**All you have to do is donate today!**__**You can send your urgent gift by clicking here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014214:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)

**Parents Union of America is fighting against the corrupt Teachers Union.**

We are a vehicle for conservative parents and teachers across the nation to systematically restore God as the foundation of our culture. And we've begun with the public education system.

Now, we're fighting to take back public schools for parents and children.

My goal is to build a grassroots network of parents and citizens from across the country who want to protect our children from this predatory movement.

**Can you help PUOA reach our goal by sending your urgent gift today? Click below.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014215:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014216:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014217:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014218:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014219:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014220:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014221:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014214:638PbEGJN:m:1:3253819041:F76D19657AD8ED4EF8644D6CED337863:r)

Thank you for fighting to protect our children.

Jessi Melton

name: Jordan, AOTL Finance
subject: Re: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Give our organizers a boost forward in the fight for fairness in our democracy.

Friend --

I just wanted to make sure you saw the message from Marco regarding our next phase.

I’ve been checking out fundraising numbers and we are a bit behind our fundraising goals. **[Rush your contribution and help us reach our one-day $5,000 goal to help us get back on track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55534704/381989649/-453728255?refcode=20221202_AOTL_F_oneday1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZTBmMzc1LWZkNzMtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UTDiUVWDAwsXym0Eu8F9seD2DAsHnnT0MziE41ykJcg=)**

Team -- the obstacles may seem enormous, but we have a unified front of individuals throughout the nation dedicated to putting people ahead of politics. That is our strength. It’s how we’ve faced challenges in the past, and how we will continue to make progress. Achieving this $5,000 goal will keep our efforts on track for the next few weeks as we approach 2023.

We’re doubling down and ready to put the plan into action. We need your help. **_Are you in?_**

name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Peter,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015413:6ufnbEGNb:m:1:3331421248:2998F8B5739B074EE52D53F41D2E0396:r)
I look forward to hearing from you, Peter.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Peter,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015414:6ufnbEGNb:m:1:3331421248:2998F8B5739B074EE52D53F41D2E0396:r) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015414:6ufnbEGNb:m:1:3331421248:2998F8B5739B074EE52D53F41D2E0396:r) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
**[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015414:6ufnbEGNb:m:1:3331421248:2998F8B5739B074EE52D53F41D2E0396:r)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: Kati
subject: Saving Senator Warnock's seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need your help
| | | This is Kati with the DSCC.

At this very moment, Democrats _across America_ are mobilizing to re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock. It’s _crucial_ that we get out the vote in Georgia ahead of Tuesday’s runoff election because we know the margin will be _razor-thin!_

This is going to take the whole country -- **but right now we're short of volunteers in Pennsylvania. Unless supporters like you come through and help make these calls, we’re looking at a MUCH tougher path to victory.**

**[Please, this is our last chance to expand our Senate majority, and Georgia voters only have until TUESDAY to cast their ballots! Will you join our virtual phone bank to make sure EVERY Georgia Democrat turns out to vote?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11368?t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9111%2E9716520%2EfDGp1k)**
| | [YES, I WILL CALL VOTERS FOR SENATOR WARNOCK](https://go.dscc.org/go/11368?t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9111%2E9716520%2EfDGp1k)
---

I have made many calls just like these, and I'm always blown away by how GRATEFUL voters are to be told critical details about how they can cast their ballots. With the experts warning of a toss-up race and with so much at stake, **no one wants to wake up on December 7th to find out they missed their chance to be heard.**

[**So please, sign up to make calls right now and help _personally_ save Senator Warnock’s seat!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11368?t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9111%2E9716520%2EfDGp1k)
I know we can count on you,

Kati
Chief Digital Officer, DSCC

| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221204-Kati-GAPhoneCallsRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9111%2E9716520%2EfDGp1k)
---
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=9111_9716520_fDGp1k&akid=9111%2E9716520%2EfDGp1k)**.

We could not have flipped the House and fired Nancy Pelosi without you. It took millions of patriots working together to send the Democrats a message.

name: (2) Penny, Steve Scalise
subject: Our next Majority Leader wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hi Peter,
This is Penny with Republican HQ.
Our next Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, emailed you earlier but you never responded. He's looking for individual input from Patriots we can trust.
_You 're at the top of our list!_
**[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014857:6t_yuEGNc:m:1:3317145305:300EBA2C0565F45921CA2B2F86557D3E:r)**
Republican leaders don't have much time until their playbook for the 2023 Congressional session is locked in. **Consider this your last and final chance to provide critical feedback to Congressional leaders.**
This is the first time Republicans have been in control of the House in FOUR years! Leaders like Steve Scalise want to make sure House Republicans start off on the right foot, so your feedback is critical to know where to begin.
[**Can you please take just a moment to complete Steve Scalise 's Majority Leader Survey now?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014858:6t_yuEGNc:m:1:3317145305:300EBA2C0565F45921CA2B2F86557D3E:r)
Thank you,
Penny
Republican HQ
_P.S. If you missed Steve 's earlier message, I've attached it below for your convenience. _
_\--------------------- (1) Missed Message from Steve Scalise ---------------------_
Subject: Help me help you?
**Hi patriot -- It 's Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I'm looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you're someone I know I can trust.
[**Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014857:6t_yuEGNc:m:1:3317145305:300EBA2C0565F45921CA2B2F86557D3E:r)
**Here 's some of the things I need advice on:**
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on stopping Critical Race Theory in Schools?_
_Should a Republican Congress COMPLETE the Southern Border Wall?_
**[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014857:6t_yuEGNc:m:1:3317145305:300EBA2C0565F45921CA2B2F86557D3E:r)**
Time is of the essence. Republican leaders like myself only have a few more days to put together our playbook of ideas for the upcoming Congressional session.
_In other words: help me help you!_
[**Please, take just 2 minutes to answer some of the most important questions I 've ever asked you before I meet with my top colleagues and Team Scalise to review your responses.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014857:6t_yuEGNc:m:1:3317145305:300EBA2C0565F45921CA2B2F86557D3E:r)
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014857:6t_yuEGNc:m:1:3317145305:300EBA2C0565F45921CA2B2F86557D3E:r)
**Steve Scalise**
_Republican Majority Leader-elect_

Friends, we're only 2 days away from the Senate runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I
can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your
immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31806?t=1010&amount=32&akid=6465%2E3611125%2E4U4nWY ]Will you split $32 or
more right now between me and Tim Ryan to keep Georgia blue?

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million—and Mitch
McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me.
Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win—but with national
Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a
second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight
back against GOP attacks—but we're falling short, and I need your help.

body:
I know a good candidate when I see one; they’re hard to come by. | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6fd8eb90f8a47edad2817ada9ce4501&_e=XlZxrU_aRuE9DIwCFmBpfbuk-dLUFwj18fA70K68uoHpOSf8M3gFcTjxUSLByp5o8CL9hu0riUJcSVu8gxnW581ygAUzIZ9LEmjQaFiWk72uP8YZfuOdt2tlKG3WtJNhIDytH1UFcoRZ9lhd44jPxnKO7wt8zxIRiEsJkEcgk_IdLjD9sUHcGmymbrixmsEPeOfkkNBIZkpzylFFNxoW4J9y8Pj-nFuHGYO8xxGck1yfLycpOc_VNtqmHf6GAnPwifcrN-Z3g7DhvkHGD6mcFFqW0rtbgTE-ZXa-9nKOaHculF-zK9JX-spITj_lMnv6yMiUvwo3pwH2Ovz3BbNP6sTSymucTgZsDzh25jiplLVvdn08TqNFJVxMrkIeZmdu2yhCDwUunePZM0nb48mHqrGiRujDeRidheGg6na-WafCnoqC014THpK5gJWcu9I2sIWEmRB96x3F-ZnELiDWRQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Most folks get into politics for all the wrong reasons. Some candidates run because of their egos or desire for fame. Others want to cash in with a lucrative book deal. Some even run because they want a stepping-stone to a higher office. It's sad, really.

**Herschel Walker is different. He's not a politician.**

Herschel doesn't need fortune or fame. He already has both.

Herschel knows America is going in the wrong direction...and he simply wants to help.

**Herschel Walker is running because Raphael Warnock is a wolf in sheep's clothing and must be defeated.**

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6fd8eb90f8a47edad2817ada9ce4501&_e=XlZxrU_aRuE9DIwCFmBpfbuk-dLUFwj18fA70K68uoHpOSf8M3gFcTjxUSLByp5o8CL9hu0riUJcSVu8gxnW581ygAUzIZ9LEmjQaFiWk72uP8YZfuOdt2tlKG3WtJNhIDytH1UFcoRZ9lhd44jPxnKO7wt8zxIRiEsJkEcgk_IdLjD9sUHcGmymbrixmsEPeOfkkNBIZkpzylFFNxoW4J9y8Pj-nFuHGYO8xxGck1yfLycpOc_VNtqmHf6GAnPwifcrN-Z3g7DhvkHGD6mcFFqW0rtbgTE-ZXa-9nKOaHculF-zK9JX-spITj_lMnv6WcALiS3EdHjSAcTR11EGUa11LUG-LmKk7Yt7KvPL2X9WfAFoWRvXhuCy8QMCHjOx6Cj2AIIDmWml1av8Hvf970gIJ830PrcIngavMKp_2tkW3R6_WomLnUbu7gv77oG9_EjzkV79KMoqdeX7qINGBw%3D%3D)
Senator Warnock is a radical liberal who votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he campaigns like a moderate in Georgia. **[We've got one last chance to stop him before it's too late.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6fd8eb90f8a47edad2817ada9ce4501&_e=XlZxrU_aRuE9DIwCFmBpfbuk-dLUFwj18fA70K68uoHpOSf8M3gFcTjxUSLByp5o8CL9hu0riUJcSVu8gxnW581ygAUzIZ9LEmjQaFiWk72uP8YZfuOdt2tlKG3WtJNhIDytH1UFcoRZ9lhd44jPxnKO7wt8zxIRiEsJkEcgk_IdLjD9sUHcGmymbrixmsEPeOfkkNBIZkpzylFFNxoW4J9y8Pj-nFuHGYO8xxGck1yfLycpOc_VNtqmHf6GAnPwifcrN-Z3g7DhvkHGD6mcFFqW0rtbgTE-ZXa-9nKOaHculF-zK9JX-spITj_lMnv6yM9x_BSoT8SI1VAAPdflkBNHhnELoxtIMqX44pPRtRlef6fReb5retvbeLAx_DQsTmRhSEedPQBqWiUhHcMvIEpIvH6mC0dGb2mFLz3GPORtx9305iJF_CMzCjy2s82-maO3iRsf1wmEJVB8SLLZFA%3D%3D)**

Even after spending nearly $120 million in the general election, Raphael Warnock still couldn't get a majority of voters to support him. Now he's in a runoff election with Herschel Walker, and we're in the final days of this race. We need to win this final Senate race of 2022, **[so I'm asking you to donate to Herschel Walker's campaign today.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6fd8eb90f8a47edad2817ada9ce4501&_e=XlZxrU_aRuE9DIwCFmBpfbuk-dLUFwj18fA70K68uoHpOSf8M3gFcTjxUSLByp5o8CL9hu0riUJcSVu8gxnW581ygAUzIZ9LEmjQaFiWk72uP8YZfuOdt2tlKG3WtJNhIDytH1UFcoRZ9lhd44jPxnKO7wt8zxIRiEsJkEcgk_IdLjD9sUHcGmymbrixmsEPeOfkkNBIZkpzylFFNxoW4J9y8Pj-nFuHGYO8xxGck1yfLycpOc_VNtqmHf6GAnPwifcrN-Z3g7DhvkHGD6mcFFqW0rtbgTE-ZXa-9nKOaHculF-zK9JX-spITj_lMnv6-cln_8I7GiUcLogy4bKpdRfwqR-lAY0FtlFjDWGbiFNW3l1BrK4_bwzx4f7dOP1349q3r7pERXnNtdP5P_xgnpC8qtGwUglHxRhktvRVMPbt6gFWf_zJB4XreCV8hQSLEArPkkDz2GSAC1CnFhR0CA%3D%3D)**

Herschel's campaign is being massively outraised by Senator Warnock and his liberal allies. There's no sugar coating it - it's been brutal to watch Herschel get outspent 2 to 1 on television. But the race is TIED, so we have a genuine shot at winning on Tuesday.

If you're mad that Republicans lost critical Senate races in Nevada, Arizona, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania on November 8th, **[will you donate $4 right now and help ensure we don't lose a 5th winnable race this year?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6fd8eb90f8a47edad2817ada9ce4501&_e=XlZxrU_aRuE9DIwCFmBpfbuk-dLUFwj18fA70K68uoHpOSf8M3gFcTjxUSLByp5o8CL9hu0riUJcSVu8gxnW581ygAUzIZ9LEmjQaFiWk72uP8YZfuOdt2tlKG3WtJNhIDytH1UFcoRZ9lhd44jPxnKO7wt8zxIRiEsJkEcgk_IdLjD9sUHcGmymbrixmsEPeOfkkNBIZkpzylFFNxoW4J9y8Pj-nFuHGYO8xxGck1yfLycpOc_VNtqmHf6GAnPwifcrN-Z3g7DhvkHGD6mcFFqW0rtbgTE-ZXa-9nKOaHculF-zK9JX-spITj_lMnv6FAVRJN5pOw1Vy85YO8yHQm4i-yxNpns-IiNFVFObywZ2FzAeHZRkujOtqwGH1-1atPCUMNGI-U-wzv-jFMoh3iHSq9rIRJdHto0t2q3M1Tt1EACNNwwsimPitEeDoTSdVTn_ExdfiTT4aUSAig8Mdg%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b6fd8eb90f8a47edad2817ada9ce4501&_e=XlZxrU_aRuE9DIwCFmBpfbuk-dLUFwj18fA70K68uoHpOSf8M3gFcTjxUSLByp5o8CL9hu0riUJcSVu8gxnW581ygAUzIZ9LEmjQaFiWk72uP8YZfuOdt2tlKG3WtJNhIDytH1UFcoRZ9lhd44jPxnKO7wt8zxIRiEsJkEcgk_IdLjD9sUHcGmymbrixmsEPeOfkkNBIZkpzylFFNxoW4J9y8Pj-nFuHGYO8xxGck1yfLycpOc_VNtqmHf6GAnPwifcrN-Z3g7DhvkHGD6mcFFqW0rtbgTE-ZXa-9nKOaHculF-zK9JX-spITj_lMnv6PFQAPYMktwACuOCYI6WwTZ6Yt6iMhGXXJJe-4BO-gtVpmcCBC9O8tejEo69o2DoIvc_6G8BYj1EikZ9cRRrWkklvfIll62YMqx0O8iC7Sr9dvbjQFOdopR4h6T7-4Oy7PIK_P5B_YQJc0mbY0TRlsA%3D%3D)

John Kennedy

**BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million**
Peter, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff.

**That's a lot of money. He _significantly_ outraised us.**

**Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle!**

There are just 2 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. _**[Will you help us close the financial gap immediately?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015473:JBlUuEGNp:m:1:3331421248:0C4920C0275BC856070995BDE024BDB1:r)**_

That's a lot of money. He significantly outraised us. Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle! There are just 2 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: There's so much at stake in this runoff election. This is our last chance to slow down Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's disastrous agenda that's crippling America. As the LAST election of the 2022 cycle, Georgia is our FINAL chance to ensure Democrats don't have a 51-seat advantage in the Senate. Please, Peter, let me know you're still with us. Hi, Peter, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.
**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. [_So please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $5 or more now – split between me and Letitia James – to keep Georgia blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55541840/381994241/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk936-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGFkMTNkNy0wNTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcScLp7FOaTgdYrff8HocAqdmC21azwtg0zqBFbVKis=)**

name: Joe Walsh via Blue Amp Action
subject: I was once part of the problem, a Tea Party Republican. Once I saw I helped pave a path to electing someone as morally and emotionally unfit as Donald Trump, I knew I had to change. That's why I'm supporting Senator Warnock, a good and decent man who will fight to protect our democracy.
body:
Counting on you
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92adb3e6-4b6c-45c4-ba70-8cc9d9af1633/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T328d41a5-050b-46c1-817d-e8fb106a4cc1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, | _**This Republican is here to tell you that you have to support Senator Raphael Warnock if we want our democracy to survive. I am not being hyperbolic. **_ [**_Will you join me by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Senator Warnock, so he can hold onto his seat next week and we can hold onto our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe261b8f-d90b-461e-a8f6-e989a9c54219/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Though I'm no longer in the good graces of the Republican Party, I still have friends and sources over there. They think they're gonna win because of all the money Mitch McConnell has dumped into the race. We can't let that happen._** As you probably know, I was once part of the problem. I was a Tea Party Republican who made the mistake of thinking outrage was why I was in Washington._ Once I saw I helped pave a path to electing someone as morally and emotionally unfit as Donald Trump, I knew I had to change._ **_That's why I'm supporting Senator Warnock, a good and decent man who will fight to protect our democracy._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help Raphael Warnock save our democracy**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T412f187a-b834-4212-a3f2-a3cd4818d5ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Look, I'll be honest with you, donations have been down the past few days. I get it, we're all tired after a long election cycle. But Mitch McConnell isn't tired. He's throwing $50 million into Georgia to buy another seat, and if we're gonna stop him we must support Senator Warnock with all we've got this last week._** _If a former Tea Party Republican can donate to Warnock, everyone can pitch in for this final effort to ensure we have the votes in the Senate to strengthen our democracy. _ [**_So will you join me by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Senator Warnock, so he can hold onto his seat this Tuesday and we can hold onto our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc86e37b5-8053-43ed-88b0-43f082f0938d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your determination to keep our republic. **Former GOP Congressman, and presidential candidate, Joe Walsh**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Raphael Warnock for Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4ce0a43-9cac-4a03-8b94-c52e1596faf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8f74e2d-7faf-4966-9c56-54b9d21ba12b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, don’t scroll away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend – I’ll keep this short:
Early voting is underway in our Senate race in Georgia. With just a couple days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.
That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.
I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.
So please, friend, will you split $20 between me and Serve America – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Your America
subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6443%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1xSDBWrDFrnunHTN1bjNhw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95062%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JNsJZbnUkPCXAfgGpI3R2w&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95063%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FKi8xW8oo9H77mi9G9IQGw&sysid=1)****[”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95064%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bdNqQhjlWctRfXJH7dGTRA&sysid=1)[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95062%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JNsJZbnUkPCXAfgGpI3R2w&sysid=1)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95075%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jcZgd6gzlagdpl8YxSyvfQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95076%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JuXX0DbAcFjZ%2fitQppHW9w&sysid=1)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Save the Senate
subject: TOSS-UP in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMPyXwArFUhhEylhu27HuuFZPbUWWTdGH4838vBzdyazPkgGfSEI9dOrau8XGHCENJ6Je06YUb2AtP8-YN1Byq9GBTg8785gsbQ_ffAWduYcpX1mdSdxRfJVf22JhpRJ-vwLac-FW7lpG3kMWgfmKNPa5jfsY9kggBu66ELEzPpPagyEuA_1BUWalMCNOoj1e4uwN5Gz9H1UU0nKEh976uJ3naGB40Z1dfIKnEhI9R2wgspZA0XeKhbQNieTvS_9xEWnGuE27uBWyVb3kq2RxyOA8DWfmK9c7a94ra9_W6krRAjta6_DgA4ohaJABYXYBs/3rp/gPjM9zcDS8CVa7x-A5pmSQ/h0/eGaoYyBvQstx_jQkKx36rz9ieQfxIiyNEyMSOv-ioPQ)
Peter, We know you’ve been inundated with election-related emails, calls, texts, and TV commercials for months. But we can’t let our foot off the gas just yet–we have to make sure Senator Raphael Warnock wins his runoff in Georgia. This race is very much a toss-up: recent polling by Emerson College Polling and The Hill show that Warnock only holds a narrow 2 percentage point lead over Trump-backed Herschel Walker, well within the margin of error. Warnock has a competitive edge, but Walker is not far behind. We cannot take for granted how absolutely close this election will be. And make no mistake, victory is critical. First of all, Herschel Walker is dangerous and unqualified, and Georgians deserve better. Secondly, if Warnock wins, Democrats could take full control of the Senate, instead of sharing power with Mitch McConnell. That means full subpoena power and a majority on every committee. Not to mention, having another *real* Democrat will vastly reduce the individual power of obstructionists Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin. [**^^What they said. clean_body: | | | Peter, We know you’ve been inundated with election-related emails, calls, texts, and TV commercials for months. But we can’t let our foot off the gas just yet–we have to make sure Senator Raphael Warnock wins his runoff in Georgia. This race is very much a toss-up: recent polling by Emerson College Polling and The Hill show that Warnock only holds a narrow 2 percentage point lead over Trump-backed Herschel Walker, well within the margin of error. Warnock has a competitive edge, but Walker is not far behind. We cannot take for granted how absolutely close this election will be. And make no mistake, victory is critical. First of all, Herschel Walker is dangerous and unqualified, and Georgians deserve better. Secondly, if Warnock wins, Democrats could take full control of the Senate, instead of sharing power with Mitch McConnell. That means full subpoena power and a majority on every committee. Not to mention, having another real Democrat will vastly reduce the individual power of obstructionists Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin. clean_body: There is no substitute for victory – help Herschel Walker WIN. | Fellow American, I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried. I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6. We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate. Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path. If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill. We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - plain and simple. If you want to help flip the FINAL Senate race of the year from BLUE to RED, then stop what you're doing and make an immediate contribution RIGHT NOW. 100% of your contribution will go directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign to help him WIN on December 6. In times like these, there is no substitute for victory. This is your opportunity to help Herschel be the conservative fighter we need in Washington. Are you with me? We need to send a powerful message to the radical Left, so I want this email to hit Herschel's MASSIVE fundraising goal by midnight. Herschel is counting on you to help him flip the final Senate seat of 2022 and help Republicans hold onto 50 seats in the United States Senate. There is no room for complacency - liberty hangs in the balance of the actions you take right now. Thank you, Ron DeSantis Governor of Florida | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States:
body:
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014795:J19KlEGNY:m:1:3317145305:75E006A1D297EF7A74E7110278DEE28E:r)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

| [**STAND WITH KARI LAKE** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014796:J19KlEGNY:m:1:3317145305:75E006A1D297EF7A74E7110278DEE28E:r)
---

Thank You,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014795:J19KlEGNY:m:1:3317145305:75E006A1D297EF7A74E7110278DEE28E:r)

Kari Lake
Candidate for Arizona Governor

* * *
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014795:J19KlEGNY:m:1:3317145305:75E006A1D297EF7A74E7110278DEE28E:r)

Peter, I won't sugarcoat it...

This Georgia runoff election is going to be an all-out _DAWG FIGHT_ , and **[Herschel Walker needs us every step of the way.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015431:JqBWlEGNg:m:1:3331703221:BB2E8897EFB72B9AC7B9ECBD77D6AF17:r)**

Early voting has already begun for the December 6 runoff election, with the fate of the nation hanging in the balance. **[So much is at stake, and Herschel needs to know that you are on his team and ready to FIGHT for America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015431:JqBWlEGNg:m:1:3331703221:BB2E8897EFB72B9AC7B9ECBD77D6AF17:r)**

[** FIGHT FOR GEORGIA -> FIGHT FOR AMERICA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015431:JqBWlEGNg:m:1:3331703221:BB2E8897EFB72B9AC7B9ECBD77D6AF17:r)
Peter, grassroots supporters like YOU are the backbone of the conservative movement. What you do right now will determine the future of our nation.

Will you sit back and allow the Democrats to push Biden's disastrous agenda and destroy the America we love? **[Or will you stand up and FIGHT to win Georgia, flip this Senate seat, and get America BACK on track?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015431:JqBWlEGNg:m:1:3331703221:BB2E8897EFB72B9AC7B9ECBD77D6AF17:r)**

It's going to take a LOT of resources to make sure Herschel can meet with as many Georgia voters as possible, **[which is why we're calling on YOU to step up and bolster his efforts. A small contribution of just $25, $50 or $100 from each person reading this email will add up quickly.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015431:JqBWlEGNg:m:1:3331703221:BB2E8897EFB72B9AC7B9ECBD77D6AF17:r)**

Whatever you give RIGHT NOW will help Team Herschel knock on more doors, make more phone calls, distribute more signs, and put new ads on the air. Every single dollar will be critical in helping Herschel win this race.

**[We're counting on you right now, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015431:JqBWlEGNg:m:1:3331703221:BB2E8897EFB72B9AC7B9ECBD77D6AF17:r)**

My very best,

Nikki Haley
