subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a c Hillsdale College | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=47c511baa5064f6aa0df23a8d3f0c2b4&_e=JXsy3VnsHYpndvVAfKN4EXCOAYzR0RtHI2valylQ7BCiZAORwFLFBsLGuh9Ww2mpF2Bu0ZEp_MdH-4s_-mtDNAXsaAzz1vRvoSxq2xWn8DclrtbbbuaY7_VRRe2Kni2JBOENR2AqUp2NFy9qbi8bP1xCU2eGctE5nWxgFCHJ7Pl-Tblz62hBumClEgkStatmaeiwuqsAuUY2rI5rZVSqD2ucZxBHrbGYWG1g_ZA0p9XgnVH1-Rj_urVh0KIwONGlWSdHg9i5KpDkDTKAphTeh8m_SVXpqqNHP2PrrJOjwCsAVJtVoSYm2Fak79h-t1J0aDVbQEmU727rIRE2XjXE1Wp9ko_gS8ppDLUgd43zUsWVDTxLQ8aVdvbqtmtQ3VorNyxKw_oPkgjNBE2cYi7TCg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=47c511baa5064f6aa0df23a8d3f0c2b4&_e=JXsy3VnsHYpndvVAfKN4EXCOAYzR0RtHI2valylQ7BCiZAORwFLFBsLGuh9Ww2mpF2Bu0ZEp_MdH-4s_-mtDNAXsaAzz1vRvoSxq2xWn8DclrtbbbuaY7_VRRe2Kni2JBOENR2AqUp2NFy9qbi8bP1xCU2eGctE5nWxgFCHJ7Pl-Tblz62hBumClEgkStatmaeiwuqsAuUY2rI5rZVSqD2ucZxBHrbGYWG1g_ZA0p9XgnVH1-Rj_urVh0KIwONGlgvMy1fghnOZSyxG8BE_4-ho8HXwAzH1XFOTJtXq5W7B56MgOMI7cNNCLIY1NLoMKmf-KFCylRfpRoDGvuRrcD8Wqr8RjrGgBT6WZyZ8oheMeD6y5LyzmAaCO_brw6o5-07maK0quy7Z6O5_PPLyYRw%3D%3D) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=47c511baa5064f6aa0df23a8d3f0c2b4&_e=JXsy3VnsHYpndvVAfKN4EXCOAYzR0RtHI2valylQ7BCiZAORwFLFBsLGuh9Ww2mpF2Bu0ZEp_MdH-4s_-mtDNAXsaAzz1vRvoSxq2xWn8DclrtbbbuaY7_VRRe2Kni2JBOENR2AqUp2NFy9qbi8bP1xCU2eGctE5nWxgFCHJ7Pl-Tblz62hBumClEgkStatmaeiwuqsAuUY2rI5rZVSqD2ucZxBHrbGYWG1g_ZA0p9XgnVH1-Rj_urVh0KIwONGlmW0lVHDq68vEBNQg3HPegT3kVKIaK_Je9YZmaiv3nSAZRn1ZDIsJi_Aupj4htP4NwV50hzLaE-rBc0WUKLnOhjsJFYOju7Hsn_1SC0z76_vslPJnAJ38T4M-qX9xqDvaJcnZfVXh59XKEyXfd_v-ZQ%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats
subject: Reflecting on the last year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Rural voters made the difference | | | Hi Peter – As we approach the end of the year, I've been reflecting on our team's progress and what's next for United Rural Democrats in 2023.
1. **The team that we have built, including you,****Peter,** is the reason why we were able to help dozens of Democrats win in 2022.
2. We still saw Democrats and Republicans alike ignore rural voters or dismiss rural candidates. **That needs to change.**
3. **We can't think of rural voters as a singular unit.** Rural voters have needs that are as diverse as the country, with a common focus on economic opportunity, workforce and educational resources, improved infrastructure, and being heard in our government.
4. **Organizing works.** It takes long hours, long drives, days on the phone, and countless volunteers, but in the age of digital communication, good old-fashioned conversation and _listening_ works.
5. **2023 will be a test for Democrats.** We have to set a foundation for growth – in 2024 and beyond. We need to offer a compelling alternative to right-wing culture wars, and we need to get it out into communities ASAP.

As we approach the end of the year, I'm also thinking about resolutions – including traveling to more rural communities and pushing the limits on my 100K+ miles from 2022. One thing is for sure, Peter, we wouldn't be where we are if it wasn't for your continued support. **[Contribute](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcnnp-aZcpRpAiAP5AoMBslz3I7GjlGLBpskjOtk8-moSZvCXnojCJFfpX4MhPtxBHTvFTinnlmdO-TXDFD4GYmVFQwAS_g4If7wyb7qoD2didqbHgQarudz3w0AUy8aHQOLXnvGeICwhTby37UDA0CBbbWM8hUf7rqQosjb3YBZO7dxQBEb-BsL_wEXJPkLP9Ro44ZLyzdYHXlyn3_KpR3c1W93PVieFb3dfyIwVJhdJR1aEO2bw4TdNc2c7jom0kzvRnuy_fMSM8CFNMz63ISraacCrxrKMeV_vbeTGHKfw/3rp/jsqOwnUQRAKAQcebGKE-6Q/h0/EkbGsWWT5o787Dz-cpnjCB8b6j6aA6jM5Q2CP4hPVfQ)** Thank you for supporting Democrats and URD. – Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats

C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e42d187c5b144929cc092c4d27dfaf6&_e=UOriTajDAlT7gsXaN2ccH8UpyL39GKMn--Xkwmf8CeryITW8d0BpctwEpKo_8bGOSHH8HXrgqn3LhVWoCK2TwszNLL8xrqDtK3FHHqSvrYl8Hulli3VCPNUxVpUYYuX0rql0AyQHwAkBHwlFRAZpcYRfbE283sZ6ixFP9B2DN3645wvEwCJd6SYPuAaJ05r9oyDvSkLKJtCinU05IDQFucvyDqB7867kVkPZAIZ0XWJVL5d6fx7YgDlIQl8rZ-nxiIoZQn_DNh6f-IqN5frvgLg95YAJfsdX0YWY75NJ4Sx6iCf6BAODNOii32asOc5SOkp6QV6tJHZpo6cs1_Bn3Y-XO4vj1qmmqyLt2u-QR1Yd2pZd3X_KeL9afCPi58CMJ1L45p1imzevvk0HQTh-I0X8UCn-eq-mtEggXv0jeWMGBRnauQBY98HiNZv_3bo_)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e42d187c5b144929cc092c4d27dfaf6&_e=UOriTajDAlT7gsXaN2ccH8UpyL39GKMn--Xkwmf8CeryITW8d0BpctwEpKo_8bGOSHH8HXrgqn3LhVWoCK2TwszNLL8xrqDtK3FHHqSvrYl8Hulli3VCPNUxVpUYYuX0rql0AyQHwAkBHwlFRAZpcYRfbE283sZ6ixFP9B2DN3645wvEwCJd6SYPuAaJ05r9oyDvSkLKJtCinU05IDQFucvyDqB7867kVkPZAIZ0XWJVL5d6fx7YgDlIQl8rZ-nxiIoZQn_DNh6f-IqN5frvgIC1XnYJav48eqNX_UKfuAtKm-1hOy__TLXWxo8LE516DF_vfrECgS1EzKh5_ccgNEnAaSvNaN7fAIzleGAf65LdRJSyzTdMhwH-lPfErBNjH9UBhVSgn5KS6fnGTeYhw9CJLnuiau_7Ezc7ewrPt2M7KtTbn2G82q3qA2hG-7k1)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e42d187c5b144929cc092c4d27dfaf6&_e=UOriTajDAlT7gsXaN2ccH8UpyL39GKMn--Xkwmf8CeryITW8d0BpctwEpKo_8bGOSHH8HXrgqn3LhVWoCK2TwszNLL8xrqDtK3FHHqSvrYl8Hulli3VCPNUxVpUYYuX0rql0AyQHwAkBHwlFRAZpcYRfbE283sZ6ixFP9B2DN3645wvEwCJd6SYPuAaJ05r9oyDvSkLKJtCinU05IDQFucvyDqB7867kVkPZAIZ0XWJVL5d6fx7YgDlIQl8rZ-nxiIoZQn_DNh6f-IqN5frvgFT7o9C97fkuMfQZ4bW1i6SQNe7LPXoDAFjwfBr8jOll0oM7aVigGsKd90woBrRZp8jdKAeUpj8IliUH1jHSBGnORXyhZKW2nHPZFz4aOVvzbFTFjzQsQNfy8k-J2VKmHdYg-DbaWDKLmTIBRsQA6y6aWHU5rUmLP1SlDq83MrYc)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e42d187c5b144929cc092c4d27dfaf6&_e=UOriTajDAlT7gsXaN2ccH8UpyL39GKMn--Xkwmf8CeryITW8d0BpctwEpKo_8bGOSHH8HXrgqn3LhVWoCK2TwszNLL8xrqDtK3FHHqSvrYl8Hulli3VCPNUxVpUYYuX0rql0AyQHwAkBHwlFRAZpcYRfbE283sZ6ixFP9B2DN3645wvEwCJd6SYPuAaJ05r9oyDvSkLKJtCinU05IDQFucvyDqB7867kVkPZAIZ0XWJVL5d6fx7YgDlIQl8rZ-nxiIoZQn_DNh6f-IqN5frvgMdsVlc6vmQ7RH-SnRTyflIfD1eQFR3I6YKMG1vu1MQs8SG8dV01q7_wFCKblnOjAP3HOQtQywXBPAsYUYfyt0KmVV58ExgOb1k6RdsRUFbFOJHFzCrVcNVm4xCQuzqYBp30hmtKS3IZjXt-B3RgR72eHJTY9nvtng4VSR3L97Xu).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a70e5071674e4d18834b5bcd3ff54c48&_e=bU_N6M-o9GdJDwlNY1lSstjIZCfB-vq13IMO483N-Xxbja97f8zBRiQ3fRxdQs844MLIfXaM5roicOnFxJDte08VY33UBuQ8jP-nhxCPBf-X4xf6FVoYV_y4_fmS1mmWKRLoYC_ZBc_SoXFORflh_t_ZE_dieyxVFLp9Oq-L8w-BfQ47dZtr0WHWdTu0DDx5-Y2XpSBEyhR6kyRCiZIU5zYtNc1nR0vd0dentGusoWORcm_AQu9yhPvVxlDT0hqsdEQBd48FmbKAZFjA9kgGEBvkmLSx8AFn4INDXnQ4u5I%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a70e5071674e4d18834b5bcd3ff54c48&_e=bU_N6M-o9GdJDwlNY1lSstjIZCfB-vq13IMO483N-Xxbja97f8zBRiQ3fRxdQs844MLIfXaM5roicOnFxJDte08VY33UBuQ8jP-nhxCPBf-X4xf6FVoYV_y4_fmS1mmWKRLoYC_ZBc_SoXFORflh_k8hi3HEkNfRk1Q89_Par-Kax6Ap5X1R6C8x2vJ8EC359Kr-_fDTX1ODg-p7fazVuEE5fyXFLWjXj4naUt3wa0lWlsqM9Et8gKOLIxZwOjA9C6RA95Pqarw0AV2UYa1DU_aQ9lm4QvO6dWNRSX81jk8%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a70e5071674e4d18834b5bcd3ff54c48&_e=bU_N6M-o9GdJDwlNY1lSstjIZCfB-vq13IMO483N-Xxbja97f8zBRiQ3fRxdQs844MLIfXaM5roicOnFxJDte08VY33UBuQ8jP-nhxCPBf-X4xf6FVoYV_y4_fmS1mmWKRLoYC_ZBc_SoXFORflh_p3eRumBAeETflfht66BNr0dwUFLSGJ0kTIKvgj6rhQpXNHzNirBtysjibjdakymrnEwyjtU_YsNPkX--ry6X7TXOImaM1w5CGfo_WKISHkQU5wEvzSAULKBKrWhyXQYHlwvcIkpINn_3Al5YPSiAjQ%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a70e5071674e4d18834b5bcd3ff54c48&_e=bU_N6M-o9GdJDwlNY1lSstjIZCfB-vq13IMO483N-Xxbja97f8zBRiQ3fRxdQs844MLIfXaM5roicOnFxJDte08VY33UBuQ8jP-nhxCPBf-X4xf6FVoYV_y4_fmS1mmWYokZC5gbsPdOcuSze0cpT6byZja1HDCA4XRmLIaVSEFf8IAhQFDsCnJsTt8NXZ4L3UAb3Bj3cGV-D7cB1LyTm-HKioesiOMZt-41yd-jXMoCJHBQfDC6YLct9hAnXiLky4vwcmc_LQLtry29j8YMwD1P3JnbnjYVIyQXQAdg9L4%3D)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a70e5071674e4d18834b5bcd3ff54c48&_e=bU_N6M-o9GdJDwlNY1lSstjIZCfB-vq13IMO483N-Xxbja97f8zBRiQ3fRxdQs844MLIfXaM5roicOnFxJDte08VY33UBuQ8jP-nhxCPBf-X4xf6FVoYV_y4_fmS1mmWP6nRc3u0r3BkpBa_TrpbCUxqaFpgSqE2i3-PGQqHMFXVml_8q7roqQNMSWLCFoyFojHMTUciQt4aCJF9QfWmZE6thVXOXfb35yxDaC1FpvDbmQB87xRL0Dw6XhGWYjg_d55WJsJKS-UpGvKwdavXFTJMHPa4D7Z7DBsqDZbmtFw5I20rYU_AUcoleBh8gXQi)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a70e5071674e4d18834b5bcd3ff54c48&_e=bU_N6M-o9GdJDwlNY1lSstjIZCfB-vq13IMO483N-Xxbja97f8zBRiQ3fRxdQs844MLIfXaM5roicOnFxJDte08VY33UBuQ8jP-nhxCPBf-X4xf6FVoYV_y4_fmS1mmWKRLoYC_ZBc_SoXFORflh_tEqGPXKxuTKqp-arodHeXkjr4BXjaf4MV0AWjAsb3x05z-KfjG0kWZ3S9h1WnLrvHZgYkzQoQOEP28gfPCpm1PEYsD34puDn83XJ06rFCUBeHlnpYgIMYeKAQgOdnwHWIjDjgfFsLOJc7mJOmqrPJA%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: fear.

body:
We’ve often said our gun laws will change when politicians realize they have more to fear from our movement than they do the NRA.
#

Friends -
We’ve often said our gun laws will change when politicians realize they have more to fear from our movement than they do the NRA.
It’s happening.
The evidence is all around us.
President Biden signed the most significant gun safety legislation in decades.
Voters said gun safety was a top voting issue in 2022.
Campaign ads in swing states more often talked about gun safety than loosening our gun laws.
That change is the product of A LOT of work, over a long time. But we cannot stop now.
Do you want universal background checks? Do you want an assault weapons ban?
Let’s keep going, because we are closer today than at any time in the last decade.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today? Every donation takes us one step closer to a future where gun violence no longer plagues communities across the country.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221204-1-15&t=1&akid=2802%2E3935704%2EwyKkPv)

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: Derek, we can't risk waking up on December 7 wishing we had done more.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’m relying on you to pitch in what you can so that my campaign and our party have what we need to send me back to the Senate. | |
---
Georgia is showing up -- and showing up _big_. Over one million Georgians voted early, smashing the record for single-day turnout in the state. This is an encouraging sign -- and it wouldn’t be possible without the support of Democrats like you. Thank you, Derek. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas -- until that final vote is cast on Tuesday, we must continue powering this campaign.** Winning this runoff election will come down to fighting for every single vote over the next two days -- and just how many doors we knock, people we call, and voters we can get to the polls depends on grassroots support, Derek. So I'm asking: **Will you split a $10 donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC today? Grassroots donations helped my campaign win our runoff last year, and they’ll make all the difference this year too.**

clean_body: I’m relying on you to pitch in what you can so that my campaign and our party have what we need to send me back to the Senate. | | Georgia is showing up -- and showing up big. Over one million Georgians voted early, smashing the record for single-day turnout in the state. This is an encouraging sign -- and it wouldn’t be possible without the support of Democrats like you. Thank you, Derek. But we can’t take our foot off the gas -- until that final vote is cast on Tuesday, we must continue powering this campaign. Winning this runoff election will come down to fighting for every single vote over the next two days -- and just how many doors we knock, people we call, and voters we can get to the polls depends on grassroots support, Derek. So I'm asking: Will you split a $10 donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC today? Grassroots donations helped my campaign win our runoff last year, and they’ll make all the difference this year too. Whether we can reach and turn out enough folks to protect this seat depends on the support we get from this grassroots team in these final two days. I’m relying on you to pitch in what you can so that my campaign and our party have what we need to send me back to the Senate. Thanks, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving these emails. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09e1daaf59e24f0eb4064feb1535be69&_e=HSdQHioj9wKNA2YGRR7AUwojUm0Lw4G7N02jwQIoE0qjDTMaRMw_BaUYc1YmDRRCNykWsRIwcYBeSi0MI-uYSYdoyBMhzLjqZSN7zNDcteMqrIa0RhKA4xuw6y44idqw7LrMZ79f9LsXPCY4Iqj9-q8bexRFAfWFU7NbhAhdtTlyurn52Q4ntoN-ipXm2Jh8ejjzLAAFBuMSmeSEqc3YfFMJ9dzoAJQAoyyn22E9KRO4lja7BE2f_muRROMvf91Cc2nCKjFGRzDrlXxWvAczpaIloc5kgVYWgaFCx3IwPhPyqB1UJ7Yh--glNp7I3JhFxLSX4TgqXmy7lvA-_NZMID1cxjV_LJqz3OaYxgVNHAiMFNGZSsKSb7C2Lu3bDXGb)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09e1daaf59e24f0eb4064feb1535be69&_e=HSdQHioj9wKNA2YGRR7AUwojUm0Lw4G7N02jwQIoE0qjDTMaRMw_BaUYc1YmDRRCNykWsRIwcYBeSi0MI-uYSYdoyBMhzLjqZSN7zNDcteMqrIa0RhKA4xuw6y44idqw7LrMZ79f9LsXPCY4Iqj9-q8bexRFAfWFU7NbhAhdtTlyurn52Q4ntoN-ipXm2Jh8ejjzLAAFBuMSmeSEqc3YfFMJ9dzoAJQAoyyn22E9KRPMyuA8UTSMf2xmo4mO4Lrlt_C2Yg_fsMyAnx4slTjFRkcxh3hu2IbmnzDFeP8HTs3mBobmUVgLl6azXfUpjRIAgx6yv3btceQSfQky19JM8IuCudN7PAPQf2jYLLWuiQKW9N2O5yHOyp6HUfjluLXz)****["](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09e1daaf59e24f0eb4064feb1535be69&_e=HSdQHioj9wKNA2YGRR7AUwojUm0Lw4G7N02jwQIoE0qjDTMaRMw_BaUYc1YmDRRCNykWsRIwcYBeSi0MI-uYSYdoyBMhzLjqZSN7zNDcteMqrIa0RhKA4xuw6y44idqw7LrMZ79f9LsXPCY4Iqj9-q8bexRFAfWFU7NbhAhdtTlyurn52Q4ntoN-ipXm2Jh8ejjzLAAFBuMSmeSEqc3YfFMJ9dzoAJQAoyyn22E9KRNto3aFujMWJmJuS8QCeBgul2U5FMGAWaNGCc2fNsZQnQ5iJvRl9l8uveRSf9QxLDBkxa5SOnAHzVoSnzl5ccf1j0Cwh7VZstP7l0QbCvjRdOyOVa5z-4dCcaOwBH9Yy1yN2skStQbRca2WrJvrbZAE) --is now available as a free online video series.**
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09e1daaf59e24f0eb4064feb1535be69&_e=HSdQHioj9wKNA2YGRR7AUwojUm0Lw4G7N02jwQIoE0qjDTMaRMw_BaUYc1YmDRRCNykWsRIwcYBeSi0MI-uYSYdoyBMhzLjqZSN7zNDcteMqrIa0RhKA4xuw6y44idqw7LrMZ79f9LsXPCY4Iqj9-q8bexRFAfWFU7NbhAhdtTlyurn52Q4ntoN-ipXm2Jh8ejjzLAAFBuMSmeSEqc3YfFMJ9dzoAJQAoyyn22E9KROzySU9NnlrbzwrpKMSxpSoRBdBnFm8vZqjBOsvSImoAnhSU0k0h8mSrRjOvgIvaCqDoa2nElMKoel0uoidkT-ll57EY19NGFdw9E5GcOqvwQ_evV8mGQ8_PwuIAEas38kEARXYimz03jf4rs8CJTWf)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09e1daaf59e24f0eb4064feb1535be69&_e=HSdQHioj9wKNA2YGRR7AUwojUm0Lw4G7N02jwQIoE0qjDTMaRMw_BaUYc1YmDRRCNykWsRIwcYBeSi0MI-uYSYdoyBMhzLjqZSN7zNDcteMqrIa0RhKA4xuw6y44idqw7LrMZ79f9LsXPCY4Iqj9-q8bexRFAfWFU7NbhAhdtTlyurn52Q4ntoN-ipXm2Jh8ejjzLAAFBuMSmeSEqc3YfFMJ9dzoAJQAoyyn22E9KRPOH6QMuE-D5FWHSlt9T78aSk9IrXl2UEfo3YmRMqznXokgOaYXjpPFbA-LyuwLsbFHIBEzJ4ThDD-YIZDERv5O5X-DywDZEG-fduqABDE6sIvcO-46zqOax4GDzmuYiv3VEgZuYi8W3HCjwLPPeiZ9)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This Georgia runoff election is going to be an all-out _DAWG FIGHT_ , and **[Herschel Walker needs us every step of the way.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015492:JFMGEEGEN:m:1:3331421248:6E0AA98C8F5DBDBC80E2ECF84A579103:r)**

subject: Our first Post-Midterm Priorities Survey >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I wanted to reach out to you personally to get your take on where you think our priorities should be in the next Congress.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1420%2E5257348%2EW8u4Eh)
Hi Derek,
Now that the dust has (mostly) settled since last month’s midterm elections, I wanted to reach out to you personally to get your take on where you think our priorities should be in the next Congress.
[**Take my campaign’s official Post-Midterm Priorities Survey and let me know your feedback for the next few months in Congress >>**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221204-priorities-survey-vsp-30.sieNUq&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221204_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1420%2E5257348%2EW8u4Eh)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221204-priorities-survey-vsp-30.sieNUq&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221204_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1420%2E5257348%2EW8u4Eh)

Hearing directly from folks like you better informs my ability to serve you in Congress — so thanks for anything you can add.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

subject: LAST CALL for $3 to win in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
That is the donation we are asking you to make today.
#
Derek -
$3.
That is the donation we are asking you to make today. Yes, $3.
$3 to help our ads reach more voters ahead of Tuesday’s election.
$3 because those ads move the polls, especially among independent voters.
$3 to help us turn out veterans FOR Senator Warnock.
$3 because we cannot do it without you.
We know $3 may seem like a drop in the bucket in this election, but because our work targets the independent voters we need to win, you get more bang for your buck when donating to VoteVets.
By the time you read this, a few people have already given their $3. Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.
[**Please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to help VoteVets deliver a victory for Democrats in Georgia this Tuesday.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221204-1-15&t=1&akid=7211%2E3013755%2E2Ed_V5)

ICYMI: On Friday at midnight, our campaign won't be able to fundraise for months as Washington state's legally mandated fundraising freeze begins. Not a dime. **Before then, we 've got to raise $50,000.** After Friday, the out-of-state attacks from far-right groups will be relentless, as we fight to enshrine the right to choose into Washington state's constitution. Since Jay emailed yesterday morning, 1,192 supporters have already chipped in $15,283 to help us protect reproductive rights, fight for climate progress, and support our progressive legislative agenda.
That's great progress -- and believe us, we're so grateful. But Jay's counting on each of us in order to reach this goal.
[_**Let 's get this done, together. Contribute $10, right now, so we can Beat the Freeze and move Washington state forward.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/2WP-M60pdpJA/NXNxSUQvQTk1aXpMT0EwQUMrWDJVUVUwaVZFb0RqQTU3TDZXbUxtM2FWOHg3NHZlWGVWQ2RTSEFLK0JxMHI0TXZETVdET1RxdjlwZW9oQUZEYVpXS3BxekVPcWMxMEsyZno3WjR6NVRHSHM9S0/UFp2VDNKdFhaMDRGRVdNM3hSbEhmRWxYOThEV09PZ0FQYWpwK1BHdklRaz0S1)
Thank you!
Team Inslee
\------ Forwarded message ------
From: **Jay Inslee**
Date: Sat, Dec 3, 2022
Subject: Humbly asking
Friend,
At midnight this Friday, I'll stop fundraising for months as Washington state's legislative fundraising freeze begins.
I have a long list of priorities for this session, from fighting the climate crisis to continuing to tackle homelessness here in Washington state. **At the top of that list is enshrining the right to choose into our state 's constitution.**
But while our fundraising efforts are frozen, far-right anti-choice groups can raise and spend millions in an all-out-attack on reproductive rights here in Washington. We can't afford to be caught flat-footed. So, our team has set a bold fundraising goal: $50,000 before the freeze, this Friday at midnight.
[_**Ahead of this crucial deadline, I 'm humbly asking: Will you make a contribution of $10 right now, so we can hit our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal, protect reproductive rights, and keep moving Washington state forward?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/2WP-M60pdpJA/NXNxSUQvQTk1aXpMT0EwQUMrWDJVUVUwaVZFb0RqQTU3TDZXbUxtM2FWOHg3NHZlWGVWQ2RTSEFLK0JxMHI0TXZETVdET1RxdjlwZW9oQUZEYVpXS3BxekVPcWMxMEsyZno3WjR6NVRHSHM9S0/UFp2VDNKdFhaMDRGRVdNM3hSbEhmRWxYOThEV09PZ0FQYWpwK1BHdklRaz0S1)
[](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/2WP-M60pdpJA/NXNxSUQvQTk1aXpMT0EwQUMrWDJVUVUwaVZFb0RqQTU3TDZXbUxtM2FWOHg3NHZlWGVWQ2RTSEFLK0JxMHI0TXZETVdET1RxdjlwZW9oQUZEYVpXS3BxekVPcWMxMEsyZno3WjR6NVRHSHM9S0/UFp2VDNKdFhaMDRGRVdNM3hSbEhmRWxYOThEV09PZ0FQYWpwK1BHdklRaz0S1)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHwj797Q~/NXNxSUQvQTk1aXpMT0EwQUMrWDJVUVUwaVZFb0RqQTU3TDZXbUxtM2FWOHg3NHZlWGVWQ2RTSEFLK0JxMHI0TXZETVdET1RxdjlwZW9oQUZEYVpXS3BxekVPcWMxMEsyZno3WjR6NVRHSHM9S0/UFp2VDNKdFhaMDRGRVdNM3hSbEhmRWxYOThEV09PZ0FQYWpwK1BHdklRaz0S1)
---
To be crystal clear: Washington state's fundraising freeze isn't a bad thing. Elected officials, myself included, should be focused on what we got elected to do: passing laws that protect and improve the lives of all Washingtonians.
But while we dedicate this legislative session to making progress in our state, far-right groups can raise and spend millions of dollars lying to the people of Washington and try to stop us from doing our jobs. And make no mistake, they've been successful halting pro-choice legislation in states even more blue than Washington.
All the while, we can't raise a penny.
So, here's the situation: To have the resources on-hand needed to get this done in the face of the outrageous out-of-state attacks we know are coming, we've got to raise $50,000 before Friday. It's just our unfortunate reality this winter.
[_**Please, I 'm asking you directly: Chip in $10 today toward our $50,000 goal, so we can hit our Beat the Freeze goal together.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/2WP-M60pdpJA/NXNxSUQvQTk1aXpMT0EwQUMrWDJVUVUwaVZFb0RqQTU3TDZXbUxtM2FWOHg3NHZlWGVWQ2RTSEFLK0JxMHI0TXZETVdET1RxdjlwZW9oQUZEYVpXS3BxekVPcWMxMEsyZno3WjR6NVRHSHM9S0/UFp2VDNKdFhaMDRGRVdNM3hSbEhmRWxYOThEV09PZ0FQYWpwK1BHdklRaz0S1)
As always, I am so grateful for your support.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHwj797Q~/NXNxSUQvQTk1aXpMT0EwQUMrWDJVUVUwaVZFb0RqQTU3TDZXbUxtM2FWOHg3NHZlWGVWQ2RTSEFLK0JxMHI0TXZETVdET1RxdjlwZW9oQUZEYVpXS3BxekVPcWMxMEsyZno3WjR6NVRHSHM9S0/UFp2VDNKdFhaMDRGRVdNM3hSbEhmRWxYOThEV09PZ0FQYWpwK1BHdklRaz0S1)

name: Warnock Campaign Team
subject: please read this ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
It’s official, friend. **Georgians are officially voting in our critical runoff Senate race, and we need all hands on deck to power Rev. Warnock to victory. Here are three key numbers you need to know:**
**2 days.**
That's how long we have before Dec. 6th’s runoff election to defend this seat.
**7 million.**
That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to reach with our people-powered message.
**$20,000.**
That's how much more we’re aiming to raise before midnight to ramp up our voter mobilization efforts in this final stretch.

name: Casey Given
subject: VIDEO messages for you
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020178:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
Hello Peter,

I'm on a mission to tell 100,000 high school students about the horrors of authoritarian socialism.

We've already gone to several high schools this semester, and it's been a huge success.

This is a subject that students don't learn about in the classroom.

These stories are more powerful than any movie or book could portray.

That's why I've set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of the year to send our speakers to 50 schools.

[_**Peter, I am humbly asking you to help reach this goal with a gift of any amount. Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020178:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)

I want to share a little bit of what students will be hearing from our speakers, so I've included a video message from Grace Jo, Frances Hui, and Daniel Di Martino.

**GRACE JO**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020178:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)

Grace was born in North Korea, where she almost starved to death as a child.

There, most of her family die of starvation, including her father, who was also tortured in jail because he left the country to find food for his family. One of Grace's older sisters went missing in China while she was searching for food to bring back. She was probably sold into human trafficking.

Grace, her mother, and one sister tried to escape North Korea many times but were repatriated, imprisoned, and tortured.

In 2006, when Pastor Philip Buck bribed North Korean agents, Grace and her two remaining family members finally escaped. **Grace moved to America in 2008 and became one of 370 refugees from North Korea.**

[_**Help Grace and our other speakers share their experiences with more high school students this year. Click here to send a gift to the Dissident Project today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020178:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)

**FRANCES HUI**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020179:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)

**Frances Hui is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America. **

At the early age of 13, Hui started her involvement in Hong Kong's social movements. She was a former standing committee member of Scholarism and a campaigner for multiple pro-democracy candidates in Hong Kong.

Hui's column, _" I am from Hong Kong, not China,"_ was featured by many international media outlets and was a widespread piece across the globe.

Currently based in the US, she heads the organization, We The Hongkongers, as the director dedicated to promoting and strengthening the culture and identity of Hongkongers abroad.

[_**If you share our mission of educating high school students on the dangers of communism, can you send a gift of any amount? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020179:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)

**DANIEL DI MARTINO**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020180:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)

**Daniel Di Martino is the founder of the Dissident Project.**

Born and raised in Venezuela, Di Martino experienced the terrible consequences of socialism firsthand. His family lost everything as hyperinflation made money worthless.

After leaving Venezuela for the United States in 2016, he dedicated himself to explaining how socialism destroyed his homeland, advocating for freedom, and stopping this ideology from ever being implemented in America and elsewhere.

Daniel has appeared dozens of times on national TV channels such as Fox News and CNN, written for the USA Today, National Review, and other news outlets, and regularly speaks at college campuses and events all over the country.

**Our speakers remind high school students that authoritarian socialism isn 't a thing of the past. Each of them has lived through it! **

I hope you can see the importance of the Dissident Project, Peter.

That's why we're raising $50,000 to send our speakers to 50 schools and connect with students. **Click below to send your gift. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020181:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020182:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020183:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020184:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020185:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020186:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020187:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020178:J-KFEEGyN:m:1:3331703221:FC7030D69A39E647060ABDDCDBFEB3E4:r)

Thank you,

Casey Given

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

name: Richard Walker
subject: A sickness in medical schools
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015335:JjOkoEGMN:m:1:3317145305:76BEB85C4E411CBBA65FA9892D71B9E3:r)

Hello Peter,

Trust in the medical field is flatlining.

The doctor-patient relationship has become weak due to these underlying symptoms:
1. Government control over the medical sector is increasing, making it harder for doctors to be independent.

2. Medical schools are turning into woke, social just activist training camps.

3. Big pharma and large hospital conglomerates crush smaller practices that can't afford to keep up with increased regulations. Most doctors are becoming employees of administrators who only care about the bottom line instead of patients' best interests.

Let me introduce myself. I am Richard Walker, Executive Director at the Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI).

**The Benjamin Rush Institute is the cure for the doctor-patient relationship. **

We're fighting to help medical students overcome the push toward socialized, government-controlled healthcare. Our medical school chapters host meaningful, engaging, educational events like debates, panel discussions, movie screenings, journal clubs, and more.

**That 's why I've set a goal to raise $10,000 to help BRI reach the next generation of medical students.** [_**Can I count on you to donate today to support our student chapters? Click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015335:JjOkoEGMN:m:1:3317145305:76BEB85C4E411CBBA65FA9892D71B9E3:r)

**Be honest:_Do you trust the new, young doctors that graduate from medical school today?_**

Most medical students today rarely receive instruction about healthcare policy. If they do, however, the focus overwhelmingly promotes a government-mandated insurance company approach to healthcare.

_They rarely -- if ever -- encounter a voice promoting free enterprise and the sanctity of the patient-doctor relationship._

**BRI fills the gap in schools where free enterprise healthcare policy discussions are under-represented or even entirely absent.**

BRI's Chapters give medical students a place to learn how a free enterprise healthcare policy can deliver affordable, quality medical care to their patients.

But _we count on people like you_ to help establish and support our medical school chapters.

[_**If your answer to the question above was _" no" _or _" I'm not sure,"_ then I hope you will show your support with a gift of any amount today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015335:JjOkoEGMN:m:1:3317145305:76BEB85C4E411CBBA65FA9892D71B9E3:r)

BRI's mission is to protect the doctor-patient relationship as the primary means of delivering quality medical care and rely on free enterprise -- _not bureaucratic dictates_ -- to encourage life-saving innovation and reduce costs.

**We believe the best way to deliver affordable, quality medical care is through _a free enterprise, limited government system_. **

The members of our chapters are future doctors who want to promote healthcare freedom and preserve the sanctity of a direct patient-doctor relationship.

**But without your urgent donation, their voices may be drowned out and disappear from medical school campuses.**

Please help me empower the next generation of medical students. **Click below to give a gift today.**

clean_body: Hello Peter, Trust in the medical field is flatlining. The doctor-patient relationship has become weak due to these underlying symptoms: 1. Government control over the medical sector is increasing, making it harder for doctors to be independent. 2. Medical schools are turning into woke, social just activist training camps. 3. Big pharma and large hospital conglomerates crush smaller practices that can't afford to keep up with increased regulations. Most doctors are becoming employees of administrators who only care about the bottom line instead of patients' best interests. Let me introduce myself. I am Richard Walker, Executive Director at the Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI). The Benjamin Rush Institute is the cure for the doctor-patient relationship. We're fighting to help medical students overcome the push toward socialized, government-controlled healthcare. Our medical school chapters host meaningful, engaging, educational events like debates, panel discussions, movie screenings, journal clubs, and more. That 's why I've set a goal to raise $10,000 to help BRI reach the next generation of medical students. Be honest:Do you trust the new, young doctors that graduate from medical school today? Most medical students today rarely receive instruction about healthcare policy. If they do, however, the focus overwhelmingly promotes a government-mandated insurance company approach to healthcare. They rarely -- if ever -- encounter a voice promoting free enterprise and the sanctity of the patient-doctor relationship. BRI fills the gap in schools where free enterprise healthcare policy discussions are under-represented or even entirely absent. BRI's Chapters give medical students a place to learn how a free enterprise healthcare policy can deliver affordable, quality medical care to their patients. But we count on people like you to help establish and support our medical school chapters. BRI's mission is to protect the doctor-patient relationship as the primary means of delivering quality medical care and rely on free enterprise -- not bureaucratic dictates -- to encourage life-saving innovation and reduce costs. We believe the best way to deliver affordable, quality medical care is through a free enterprise, limited government system. The members of our chapters are future doctors who want to promote healthcare freedom and preserve the sanctity of a direct patient-doctor relationship. But without your urgent donation, their voices may be drowned out and disappear from medical school campuses. Please help me empower the next generation of medical students. Click below to give a gift today. Thank you, Richard W. Right now, we have a razor-thin margin in the Senate and we can’t afford to lose Raphael Warnock’s seat (especially not to Total Disaster Herschel Walker). To victory! The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. I'm not surprised. Under my leadership, our Nation was at a pinnacle of power, prosperity, and prestige—towering above all rivals, vanquishing all enemies, and striding into the future confident and strong.

I will keep working for YOU. As the 2024 Election rapidly approaches, I URGENTLY need a brave Patriot like _**YOU**_ on my side.

_**Remember, this will not be MY campaign—this will be OUR campaign. Because the only force strong enough to defeat the massive corruption we are up against is YOU, the AMERICAN PEOPLE.**_

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Arizona has been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. This is why we must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes.
body:
important recount update
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9be01996-3a40-4f49-96d2-9b4074eae1d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_There is one more Bie Lie supporting, anti-democracy election denier left whom we must stop._** We didn't only turn the red wave into a blue crush, but we defeated almost every one of the loudest election deniers running in 2022. [_**But, to finish the job, we must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes. This is why your support for the Democratic Attorneys General Association is critical at this time.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbdf3d303-2bc9-45da-8059-c579aa8dbea5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Arizona has been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. Kari Lake not only refuses to concede, but still spits out lie after lie about "election fraud" that doesn't exist. **Ruby-red Cochise County, AZ had to be sued by current Secretary of State and Governor-elect Katie Hobbs to force them to submit their vote tallies, as they denied a fair election took place by presenting zero evidence and a whole lot of conspiracies.** A second county, Mohave, also initially refused, until the threat of arrest forced the Republican commissioners to back down. _ __And, of course, Hamadeh himself is spewing every conspiracy theory he can conjure up, damaging the faith Arizonans, and all Americans, have in our democratic process._ __So we must be ready for Hamadeh's team to pull out every trick, including trying to alter and/or destroy ballots, engage in ridiculous lawsuits, propaganda and even intimidation--anything they can think of, legal or otherwise--to try and wrest the election away from the 99% certain winner after a legitimate recount, Kris Mayes._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: No election deniers for attorney general**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9067f0f1-a7a2-4429-887b-f19b2aef9be7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _We can't make Hamadeh have an ounce of class or respect for the Democratic process and shut his mouth. But we can make sure he isn't able to find a way to illegally or unethically win this election, so he can spout this trash while serving as the highest ranking law enforcement office in Arizona._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Democratic Attorneys General Association (DAGA) so they can use these resources to make sure there is a fully aboveboard recount and the legitimate winner--Kris Mayes--ascends to the position of Arizona Attorney General?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3af82731-7ff7-4823-b31a-0bf8ca080617/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know fighting these ghouls is exhausting, and **so appreciate** your standing with Blue Amp Action in this fight. Thanks!
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T268566a5-a2de-429c-9690-44c39ee16de1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
| | | Hi friend, it’s Doug Emhoff.

I wanted to reach out _personally_ because the runoff election in Georgia is this Tuesday, and winning this race and _expanding_ our Senate majority would be huge for Joe and Kamala.

[**Moments like this don't get any bigger -- so will you rush $5 to the DSCC right now to help re-elect Democrats like Raphael Warnock and fight for our Democratic majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221204-DougEmhoff-DougEmhoff1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221204-DougEmhoff-DougEmhoff1-Pros-sl1&akid=9047%2E9716520%2Eq8HQ59)

I’ve been blessed to have a front-row seat to all the tremendous progress that Joe and Kamala have made in just two short years.

They’ve invested in American infrastructure and manufacturing, spurred record-breaking job growth, put Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson on the Supreme Court, and so much more. **And they’ve done all of it with a Senate split right down the middle. 50-50.**

Tuesday's runoff is our last chance to break that deadlock and open the door to even more historic progress, but we only have a few days left to make a difference.

[**So, I’m personally asking you to join me and Democrats across the country and rush $5 to the DSCC, so we can win states like Georgia and fight for our Democratic Senate >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221204-DougEmhoff-DougEmhoff1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221204-DougEmhoff-DougEmhoff1-Pros-sl1&akid=9047%2E9716520%2Eq8HQ59)

name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States 📧
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014637:JJAyVEGNw:m:1:3331703221:2D285A02847335D4650A31236E3EA928:r)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

| [**STAND WITH KARI LAKE** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014638:JJAyVEGNw:m:1:3331703221:2D285A02847335D4650A31236E3EA928:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014637:JJAyVEGNw:m:1:3331703221:2D285A02847335D4650A31236E3EA928:r)

Kari Lake

clean_body: | To the People of Arizona and of the United States: Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history. Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures. Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair. This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country. Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were. I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections. | Thank You, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor *

Make no mistake: The socialist agenda is holding America back.** ** It’s telling a single mom to give up and give in to a life of welfare.** ** It’s telling an unemployed worker to stop trying and stay home. ** ** It’s telling college students to expect more from others than they do of themselves.** ** And it’s telling the rest of us: Don’t bother to dream or dare. Government will give you everything you want.** ** Socialism drives greatness into ruin. Capitalism brings hope. ** ** I want to know what you think is better for our country — capitalism or socialism? name: Lt. Gen. Jack Bergman, USMC (ret)
subject: Yup, the military’s gone Woke!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
Just take a look at what they've turned our military into!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015396:JjJTGEGCN:m:1:3331421248:3C85E710410BC3A38E6BDCCBA093B3F5:r "Headline") Peter: Biden's Department of Defense just got caught lying and we have the proof. The DoD has been spending taxpayer dollars promoting Critical Race Theory and Gender Identity to our soldiers! Never mind the ongoing threats from China and Russia... the Pentagon's been more worried about telling white soldiers how evil and oppressive they are! This must stop immediately! We need real warriors, not WOKE warriors! **[Help me keep our Armed Forces focused on military readiness instead of CRT. Donate $25, $50, or $100 today and stop Biden's woke social experiment!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015396:JjJTGEGCN:m:1:3331421248:3C85E710410BC3A38E6BDCCBA093B3F5:r "Help me keep our Armed Forces focused on military readiness instead
of CRT. Donate $25, $50, or $100 today and stop Biden’s woke social experiment!")** Let me be blunt, Biden and the Left have declared WAR against our military and it's a disgrace! They don't want a battle-ready military; they want Woke warriors to promote their socialist propaganda! Just take a look at what they've turned our military into!
* A Biden Military leader tweeting that they're tired of "White folx."
* Tax dollars spent on transgender reassignment surgery.
* Cadets at our service academies are taught CRT.
* Even the Special Forces are required to come up with a Diversity and Inclusion Strategic Plan!

After spending over 40 years in the United States Marine Corps (Oorah), watching brave American men and women risk their lives for our great nation, I refuse to let Biden turn our military into an international laughingstock! **[Will you join me in the fight to keep our military ready to defend our nation? Chip in $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015396:JjJTGEGCN:m:1:3331421248:3C85E710410BC3A38E6BDCCBA093B3F5:r "Will you join me in the fight to
keep our military ready to defend our nation? Chip in $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015396:JjJTGEGCN:m:1:3331421248:3C85E710410BC3A38E6BDCCBA093B3F5:r "Headline")I'm not fighting this battle for me. I'm fighting it for the next generation of Americans. The oath I took as a Marine is something I take very seriously, and even though I'm no longer in uniform, those principles guide my every decision. That's why I'm 100% committed to stopping these Woke warriors from destroying our U.S. military. **[Chip in a $50 donation to fight against Biden, and every other Leftist hell-bent on destroying our military readiness.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015396:JjJTGEGCN:m:1:3331421248:3C85E710410BC3A38E6BDCCBA093B3F5:r "Chip in a $50 donation to fight against Biden, and every other
Leftist hell-bent on destroying our military readiness.")** The brave men and women in uniform deserve better. We're constantly facing serious threats from those who seek to do us harm, but our enemies will have no reason to fear us if our military prioritizes CRT over military readiness. It's time to fight back. It's time to equip our military with the right equipment and training, not funding for transgender surgeries and Woke politics! **[If you agree, then join the Bergman Brigade TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015396:JjJTGEGCN:m:1:3331421248:3C85E710410BC3A38E6BDCCBA093B3F5:r "If you agree, then join the Bergman Brigade TODAY!")** God Bless America,

Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. General, U.S.M.C. (ret.) P.S. I don't care if our Service Members are white, black, or green. We should only care if they're willing to fight to defend our country. **[Donate $50, $100, or any amount you can afford so we can remove the Woke politics from our military ranks and leave it for the leftist politicians!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015396:JjJTGEGCN:m:1:3331421248:3C85E710410BC3A38E6BDCCBA093B3F5:r "Donate $50, $100, or any amount you can afford so we can remove
the Woke politics from our military ranks and leave it for the leftist politicians!")**
---

name: John Kasich
subject: November's Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Many have reached out to ask my thoughts about November's election, and while I sometimes feel like a broken record, I feel the same way I've felt for a long time now.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=ab03ee2475d849de8c19ec1ee50f0bc7&_e=OHAkMA_Kh8-aqlxJ6qhulluHhMTPR0iGvLUHNrPoYped-L6JH3Kc9jw5prDqMcLlJSeCxwrrAFttZlhDR8cqfH27pzv1TFEQ2K4FMMI4j_-tf8IH_ZBUpeqZjIUqdQUcBbiaGcQVycHIPZrdK94z90NYapmudnYu6y8dBjJWthuc0_8WK3MSj9xTeiF4lJQfE-FsUGr_jg9BOhfdXpH-RA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, Many have reached out to ask my thoughts about November's election, and while I sometimes feel like a broken record, I feel the same way I've felt for a long time now. **America would be better served if our leaders looked for ways to work together rather than seeking ways to tear each other down**. It's pretty simple if you think about it, but it's so rare these days that I feel many have given up hope that it's even possible. Republicans did not win the large majority in the U.S. House and did not win the majority in the U.S. Senate because they largely decided to oppose President Biden and his agenda without providing any meaningful agenda and ideas to do something different. It's one thing to complain about something or criticize it, but if you don't have a better idea and you're not willing to put in the hard work to get something done, then you're just making noise for the sake of winning at all costs. It's also pretty obvious that President Trump played a big role in these electoral losses, as he often does, by recruiting fringe candidates that can't win general elections. It happened in 2018, 2020 and again this year. It's good to see some folks finding their courage and finally saying that out loud when their silence has been deafening these last six years or so. When they had a chance to stop this plague on our party, they were either silent or complicit and we've all been paying a heavy price since. I'll be honest with you - I don't know what the future holds, but I am confident that Donald Trump will not be our president again. He can run if he wants, and if too many other candidates run again and split the vote, he may well win the Primary, but he will not become president. Americans have seen enough of that chaos. By winning a very narrow majority in the U.S. House, the Republicans have a real opportunity to fight for a conservative agenda. There will be a temptation for House Republicans to do a tit for tat and launch new investigations, but that doesn’t lend itself to serving our country. Instead, they need to reach across the aisle to find compromise on meaningful issues facing our nation. Getting 80% of what you want is still winning now matter how hard some try to convince you otherwise. **Are they up to the challenge?** I hope they shock us all by finding ways to work together to make progress. Time will tell which path they choose. Thank you for all that you do to lift those around you and help others. I am thankful for you! Sincerely, -John
---

clean_body: Many have reached out to ask my thoughts about November's election, and while I sometimes feel like a broken record, I feel the same way I've felt for a long time now.| | | Peter, Many have reached out to ask my thoughts about November's election, and while I sometimes feel like a broken record, I feel the same way I've felt for a long time now. America would be better served if our leaders looked for ways to work together rather than seeking ways to tear each other down. It's pretty simple if you think about it, but it's so rare these days that I feel many have given up hope that it's even possible. Republicans did not win the large majority in the U.S. House and did not win the majority in the U.S. Senate because they largely decided to oppose President Biden and his agenda without providing any meaningful agenda and ideas to do something different. It's one thing to complain about something or criticize it, but if you don't have a better idea and you're not willing to put in the hard work to get something done, then you're just making noise for the sake of winning at all costs. It's also pretty obvious that President Trump played a big role in these electoral losses, as he often does, by recruiting fringe candidates that can't win general elections. It happened in 2018, 2020 and again this year. It's good to see some folks finding their courage and finally saying that out loud when their silence has been deafening these last six years or so. When they had a chance to stop this plague on our party, they were either silent or complicit and we've all been paying a heavy price since. I'll be honest with you - I don't know what the future holds, but I am confident that Donald Trump will not be our president again. He can run if he wants, and if too many other candidates run again and split the vote, he may well win the Primary, but he will not become president. Americans have seen enough of that chaos. By winning a very narrow majority in the U.S. House, the Republicans have a real opportunity to fight for a conservative agenda. There will be a temptation for House Republicans to do a tit for tat and launch new investigations, but that doesn’t lend itself to serving our country. Instead, they need to reach across the aisle to find compromise on meaningful issues facing our nation. Getting 80% of what you want is still winning now matter how hard some try to convince you otherwise. Are they up to the challenge? I hope they shock us all by finding ways to work together to make progress. Time will tell which path they choose. Thank you for all that you do to lift those around you and help others. I am thankful for you! Sincerely, -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

body:
I need you with me to win this runoff election in Georgia.
| | |
---
Friend, this isn't the update I want to be sharing just two days before the runoff ends – but I know __ we can turn things around if we act fast. **We're still falling short of our midnight fundraising goal. We need just 22 more grassroots folks to rush their support by midnight to keep up our momentum in this critical moment.**
Right now, I'm running neck and neck with Herschel Walker, and this runoff Senate race will be decided on the margins. _I need you with me to win._
