name: Susie Lee
subject: They said we wouldn’t win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55544875/382011611/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNiZDI1Ny0yOTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvAYCLpXvsRdf28Y11cYdGp7262A6a81p14GtD_D-VA=)

| | Folks, election forecasters and pundits across the country said we wouldn’t win this race. **But once every vote was counted, we won by 4 points against my far-right opponent.** I’m going to talk a little more about this but, before I do, [**I’m asking you to please chip in to help me keep up the fight in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55544876/382011612/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221204_FR_THEYSAID_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNiZDI1Ny0yOTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvAYCLpXvsRdf28Y11cYdGp7262A6a81p14GtD_D-VA=) | | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55544877/382011613/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221204_FR_THEYSAID_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNiZDI1Ny0yOTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvAYCLpXvsRdf28Y11cYdGp7262A6a81p14GtD_D-VA=)
---
Like they did in other parts of the country, the Republican Party nominated one of their most radical candidates to run against me. And in so many toss-up races across the country, similar far-right candidates lost.
Here’s the thing: the GOP leaned hard into supporting candidates who had a history of election denialism and cozying up to Donald Trump – _even after he had a rare presidential incumbent loss in the 2020 election._ They ran on platforms that were closely aligned to Trump’s and welcomed his endorsement in their races.
**What these GOP losses in toss-up districts like mine tell us is that Nevadans (and a majority of Americans) are tired of Republican extremism.**
I’m proud to have run a campaign that put Nevadans first. From protecting Social Security and Medicare to fighting for reproductive rights, we spoke to the issues that mattered most in households across NV-03.
Meanwhile, Republicans relied on fear mongering and name-calling to appeal to voters. That’s why when I heard that election forecasters were predicting we’d lose this race, _I was shocked._
What this past election has shown is that voters are tired of the fighting and division, the two things that the GOP relied on to win in races like mine.
So, even though the forecasters and pundits were wrong this time around, we can’t become complacent. **I need every ounce of support you can give to keep this seat blue.**
[**Will you please chip in however much you can to support me as I take on the GOP’s new far-right House majority and organize to keep this NV-03 blue for years to come?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55544878/382011614/2028753306?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221204_FR_THEYSAID_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzNiZDI1Ny0yOTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvAYCLpXvsRdf28Y11cYdGp7262A6a81p14GtD_D-VA=)

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: Poll Worker Exposes Election Day Chaos in Maricopa County

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: I need you to join me in this fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014749:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)
---
Peter,

**I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried.**

I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6.

**We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate.**

Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path.

If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill.

We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - _plain and simple._

If you want to help flip the FINAL Senate race of the year from BLUE to RED, then stop what you're doing and make an immediate contribution RIGHT NOW. 100% of your contribution will go directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign to help him WIN on December 6.

_**[Will you chip in to help Herschel win big?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014749:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)**_
[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014750:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014751:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)
_**In times like these, there is no substitute for victory.**_ This is your opportunity to help Herschel be the conservative fighter we need in Washington.

_**Are you with me?**_
_We need to send a powerful message to the radical Left, so I want this email to hit Herschel's MASSIVE fundraising goal by midnight._ **[Will you help us hit that goal by chipping in right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014749:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)**

[** RUSH $75 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014752:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014753:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)
Herschel is counting on you to help him flip the final Senate seat of 2022 and help Republicans hold onto 50 seats in the United States Senate.

There is no room for complacency - liberty hangs in the balance of the actions you take right now. **[Stand with me. Stand with Herschel Walker. Let's WIN this race, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014749:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)**

Thank you,

Ron DeSantis
Governor of Florida

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014749:J54KGEGuN:m:1:3317145305:EB4A090BD9C6A0522880C3D87CA73835:r)

name: Mary Vought
subject: Conservative Battleground
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
---
|
---
Peter: Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_
**[Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015456:6HqWGEGdN:m:1:3331703221:AA642663F21BB2275B8240539FF727A8:r)**
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: _**conservative principles and us.**_
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?
▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?
▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?
▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?
▶︎ To secure our border?
▶︎ To clean up our streets?
**[Please chip in to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62015456:6HqWGEGdN:m:1:3331703221:AA642663F21BB2275B8240539FF727A8:r)**
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates. Sincerely,
---
---
Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: update RE: last week
body:
|
---
| | Quick update...

I was at the Capitol all week for new legislator orientation.

We learned a lot.

Everyone met everyone.

[We got sworn in and picked our seats](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f3fcbca418&e=dea908e0fe "See us getting sworn in").

We voted on Senate leadership (nothing changed).

And we got our committee assignments (I got Senate Education and Vice Chair of Senate Commerce and Human Resources which deals with things like insurance, licensing, state business, etc.).

As you can guess, _I'm thrilled to be on Senate Ed._ Universal school choice is at the top of my list when it comes to education and the committee is stacked with conservatives who will prioritize that above all else.

So, that's it for my quick update.

Hit me with any questions and I'll get back to you.

Have a great Sunday.

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.** Here's a picture of me at my seat... I got the front row:

**P.P.S.** In case you want to learn more about school choice, [this should help](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=c1710e7e85&e=dea908e0fe "what is school choice?").

**P.P.P.S.**[Here's the link to the Canyon County GOP Newsletter](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=82fce3b337&e=dea908e0fe "Get the Canyon County Republican newsletter") (get on this list to keep up with what we're doing big picture).

This post is the first in a series examining the disturbing reliance of elected Democrats--from Washington DC to the Bay Area--on racism and white supremacy as a political strategy. It will also explore how that employment of racism enables policy decisions that favor capital over working Americans. Taken together with my longstanding critique of industrial militarism, it ultimately aims to offer [evidence of the intersections](https://substack.com/redirect/b7cd740c-68fc-4e39-b679-d858593e0edb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) among the evils described by Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
This introductory post will examine national trends with respect to voting patterns in minority communities and the implications of the recent bipartisan decision in Washington to deny railway workers their right to withhold labor. A series of ensuing posts will closely examine San Francisco and Oakland to document a pattern in the Bay Area that unfortunately includes elected officials, as well as members of the institutional press both in the corporate establishment and well beyond it, that critically enables the bipartisan corruption apparent in Washington.
Our region has long enjoyed a renowned reputation as a progressive enclave, but that shoe fits less well with every passing year.
And while this might seem like a regional problem, it has unfortunately national implications. San Francisco wields [outsized, even bizarre, influence](https://substack.com/redirect/57d9b580-3bb8-4be2-be13-b123041ac09f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Washington and has recently emerged as one epicenter of a national conservative [counter-attack](https://substack.com/redirect/24ccc235-a495-46a4-b9f5-9c702ccd45d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) successfully eroding progressive victories.
### A few updates from this column
I recently [addressed](https://substack.com/redirect/e7fb871e-4a2d-47ab-9966-35503a73d139?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) House Speaker Nancy Pelosi's announcement that she plans to remain in Congress while finally fulfilling her promise to allow another (only [barely less](https://substack.com/redirect/19c4b065-81f0-4326-aed8-675cbcffb4ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) problematic) member to lead House Democrats.
That writing led to [a video interview](https://substack.com/redirect/98354a10-bcf8-4745-9b20-fcae543df7c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Sabby Sabs from the [Revolutionary Blackout Network](https://substack.com/redirect/134ebf9b-3ab1-4f79-ba77-78ff08e2bb59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In addition to discussing that article, we also examined two others that I published this fall. One of them exposed the use of [racism by Democrats to protect corrupt party leaders](https://substack.com/redirect/b151fe36-2fe0-418a-9362-938d4fb6b43d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while the other examined the [roots of political violence in corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/0a4e2b16-f3a7-43ff-9f48-7c64b09e877d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) indulged by the press.

### **Democrats ' racial hypocrisy points a gun at their own feet**
One especially crucial result from last month's mid-term congressional election was in Nevada--the state that [let Georgia off the hook](https://substack.com/redirect/09d2353f-9890-4704-aada-02e8e82b4193?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by securing the Democrats' Senate majority. The youth Latino vote [proved pivotal](https://substack.com/redirect/4ebb9f11-dff4-4b75-abe9-58b4475544e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) there, skewing well [to the left](https://substack.com/redirect/d0bd501a-570b-469c-93de-2c8546a79b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Latino electorate elsewhere. That's indescribably fortunate, but carries limited relevance beyond Nevada.
Across the country, Latino voters have [trended](https://substack.com/redirect/60f58165-b093-4915-8ad9-b89df8bc4a28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) towards the GOP in recent years, dashing visions for what some (including me) once hoped could be the basis for a permanent Democratic majority.
Instead, with [gerrymandering](https://substack.com/redirect/3cfef315-e20e-4965-85f6-4537ab58d27a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) having placed a minority of voters in control of a majority of the legislative seats, and the [Supreme Court considering a case](https://substack.com/redirect/af9eff8b-2862-44bd-af35-8e94a0f8a09e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that could effectively allow gerrymandered state legislatures to control state election outcomes, we instead face the real possibility of permanent Republican majorities.
The same pattern--communities of color on whom Democrats have long relied for support defecting, or alternatively, declining to vote--also emerges when examining [voting trends in Black communities](https://substack.com/redirect/6381ee43-02e5-4c16-9b22-e58165fef7ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Herschel Walker forcing a runoff election in Georgia against Sen. Rafael Warnock is a painful omen indicating the GOP's likely strategy going forward: superficial diversity and strategic racial opportunism (encouraged by the hyper-compensation of celebrities, from athletes to musicians, who believe they share class interests with conservative capital).
At the same time, the conservative strategy--embraced by Republicans and Democrats alike, from GOP Senate candidates Herschel Walker and Kelly Loeffler to Democratic Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi--also includes demonizing figures who champion racial, economic, reproductive, and climate equity.
In Georgia, Sen. Raphael Warnock (D-GA) fended off what he & his campaign described as GOP candidate Loeffler's "[smears](https://substack.com/redirect/f00156e2-c40f-47ce-a12b-7140088f0b33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" in 2020, only for his ads responding to them to later become the target of compounding disinformation from Walker in [2022](https://substack.com/redirect/61a50f3b-2696-4214-a8a0-8d59cb213d19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I know that pattern all too well, having myself endured [a more vicious version](https://substack.com/redirect/896c3796-a0a7-43ae-9d82-2e8574f67b8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of it at the hands of San Francisco Democrats--including many self-described "progressives" and "socialists"--who enabled Pelosi even while some claimed to oppose many of her policies.
While the Senate remains in Democratic hands, the House has shifted to GOP control [despite errors that offered Democrats opportunities](https://substack.com/redirect/c825dbd4-6869-4380-9841-84eb26df85ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) they could not actualize. That reflects this pattern of Democrats [struggling](https://substack.com/redirect/a0b473db-4305-4473-9500-5bd08682f9f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to turn out once reliable bases, particularly across communities of color beyond Nevada.
This sad pattern stretches from New England to Los Angeles. Many voices have attributed it to a continuing [failure of Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/400482e1-4917-474b-9974-1b8c89604464?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to show up for the policy priorities of communities of color, or [more recently, labor](https://substack.com/redirect/f14ad8c8-bc05-4a30-a59f-a1a6126a3544?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### Yet Again, Democrats Side with Wall Street Before Workers
The [obsequious](https://substack.com/redirect/c87514b4-1e68-440f-bb37-84dba0f6a22f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) deference of labor leaders to elected Democrats is painful to witness, especially when those Democrats then [sell out](https://substack.com/redirect/00b2aee8-d945-4671-96f5-8740449e60fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) labor [time](https://substack.com/redirect/d05e4021-ac30-491a-ab40-c2f4763b5dae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [time](https://substack.com/redirect/c149dad5-1138-475d-8629-6b06f056afeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) again--putting those labor leaders in the awkward position of selling out their rank & file equally often.
Having helped force the House to pass the Protecting Right to Organize Act in 2020 after [Pelosi's previous refusal](https://substack.com/redirect/19224204-59a2-482e-9422-0a238c203b26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to allow a vote on the bill, it's no surprise to me to watch career & dynasty politicians reveal their true colors.
I wish others paid more attention, if only to avoid their own surprise every time this pattern repeats itself.
Most recently, Democrats in Washington [joined](https://substack.com/redirect/b6e250af-0d36-4074-b6cf-c81fa2ec8222?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) their Republican colleagues to pass a bill blocking railway workers from striking over long denied demands for paid sick leave. That decision did several things at once: it (1) eroded labor rights established through [generations](https://substack.com/redirect/a1de81fd-acc9-4bd2-9028-a833d597bf92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of organized struggle, (2) undermined public health in the midst of a continuing global pandemic, and (3) paved the path for the return of a Republican to the White House in 2024.
First, let's be clear: voting to block a strike is worse than crossing a picket line. Every Democrat who joined Republicans--either overtly, or through their [bait & switch hijinks](https://substack.com/redirect/edb3e993-84f3-47b4-a081-cdf9de81ef43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) through which some claimed to have shown performative solidarity--should be publicly shamed, and ultimately replaced.
Many have attempted lame explanations, while [conveniently pointing the finger](https://substack.com/redirect/6c2a8970-4138-4db5-9847-60aeea9920c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at Republicans. Don't buy it. Kshama Sawant, an elected Seattle Council Member with a proven track record of standing up for the working class, put it in no uncertain terms while addressing the most "progressive" among House Democrats, alongside their enablers in the Dramatic Socialites of America.

They ran ...](https://substack.com/redirect/f59f40e1-04c4-4c70-a8db-b9e6719ff774?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[3:13 PM ∙ Dec 2, 2022

8,788Likes2,137Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/56c52a8d-5ffa-418e-9c6b-7138a1c4d89f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Public health is among the casualties of Democrats' crass prevarication and dedication to business interests before their own supporters. It has long been shameful that the U.S. [denies](https://substack.com/redirect/ae83a698-5af0-40ab-8b86-a8d35b4daac6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) any entitlement to paid sick leave as a matter of national policy. It's one reason that America's public health performance is demonstrably among the worst in the world.
The proposed strike by railway workers simply sought to leverage collective bargaining principles long established in our country to seek from the market crucial benefits that our government--with the help of Democrats--has long denied.
For Congress to go [out of its way](https://substack.com/redirect/22a57890-6585-4301-88b4-a5910bc56567?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to affirmatively block them from striking is far from neutral.
It is an inevitably distributive decision that puts the health and well-being of workers behind corporate profits.
Nor was it isolated. Sadly, this is part of a repeating pattern. When labor demanded a long overdue increase in the federal minimum wage, the answer from Congress was [crickets](https://substack.com/redirect/00b2aee8-d945-4671-96f5-8740449e60fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When the economy fell into recession in 2008, homeowners and renters received [no support at all, while Washington bailed out Wall Street](https://substack.com/redirect/288d6bf4-42f8-41ec-a641-4367466d0c54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before a series of repeated (and predictably continuing) [tax cuts](https://substack.com/redirect/89d968dc-baad-4768-aa16-a628a76cc15b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) targeting [millionaires](https://substack.com/redirect/5e496c6a-50e2-4bff-98a1-d9e85b88101d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Nor was the latest abdication by Democrats technocratic, or necessary to avert an economic meltdown. Railroads made [record profits](https://substack.com/redirect/173eebcf-47c4-4f0d-8f06-99726986f1db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last year amounting to $20 billion, and enjoy among the [highest profit margins](https://substack.com/redirect/e327a2a6-7bb2-4c68-96e8-54d9df864bbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of any industry in the country. The cost of workers' demands for paid sick leave, meanwhile, would have been [$688 million](https://substack.com/redirect/c25dc11e-4e28-4101-b0e0-1e661b12e305?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Much like [false](https://substack.com/redirect/90914c41-7861-435e-a61f-f3ad34a29dd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claims about inflation being driven by higher wages rather than [corporate opportunism](https://substack.com/redirect/fcda544d-3e66-4561-b7e7-a7d0e2e020c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the rail industry and its defenders claimed that allowing rail workers to exercise their right to strike would create risks to the economy during a crucial time for shipping.
All they had to do in order to avert it was invest less than 5% of their profits to satisfy workers' demands. But that was too much for Congress, which bent over backward to insulate the industry from organized labor even at the cost of public health.
Even for those Democrats who care neither about labor rights nor public health, the predictable results of last week's sell out should still be cause for alarm. In the same way that Democrats routinely create escalating political risks for themselves by failing to show up for communities of color and alienating voters from them, they do the same by [giving the middle finger](https://substack.com/redirect/92ea9899-70b3-42e6-ab9b-7fb7135aeb68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to another of their most crucial bases of once reliable support.
As we look forward to the 2024 presidential primary season [already underway](https://substack.com/redirect/eec00174-fefd-4488-ad02-bc99c5568d07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), one takeaway from last week emerges as especially crucial.

Analyses about Democrats abandoning their supporters are sadly accurate--but even they ultimately remain charitable. Beyond selling out labor and the communities of color on whom they rely for support, Democrats have actively weaponized strategic racism to insulate self-serving party leaders from electoral accountability and climb the party ladder.
This series will continue with a series of posts examining white supremacy among elected Democrats from Los Angeles to San Francisco and Oakland, as well as the climbing careerists and "journalists" who enable their continuing corruption.
In the meantime, paid subscribers can access below a recent interview on the Broken Record Player podcast. The discussion addressed the chasm between San Francisco's progressive reputation and its outrageously racist reality, as well as a discussion about music focused on the life and work of Fela Kuti, the father of afrobeat and among the most committed musical revolutionaries the world has ever seen...

clean_body: The West Coast prides itself on a progressive consensus violated by elected Democrats across California, who play a key role in enabling the party's dedication to Wall Street before working people. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? The West Coast prides itself on a progressive consensus violated by elected Democrats across California, who play a key role in enabling the party's dedication to Wall Street before working people. | | | Dec 4| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | ? This post is the first in a series examining the disturbing reliance of elected Democrats--from Washington DC to the Bay Area--on racism and white supremacy as a political strategy. It will also explore how that employment of racism enables policy decisions that favor capital over working Americans. Taken together with my longstanding critique of industrial militarism, it ultimately aims to offer among the evils described by Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. This introductory post will examine national trends with respect to voting patterns in minority communities and the implications of the recent bipartisan decision in Washington to deny railway workers their right to withhold labor. A series of ensuing posts will closely examine San Francisco and Oakland to document a pattern in the Bay Area that unfortunately includes elected officials, as well as members of the institutional press both in the corporate establishment and well beyond it, that critically enables the bipartisan corruption apparent in Washington. Our region has long enjoyed a renowned reputation as a progressive enclave, but that shoe fits less well with every passing year. And while this might seem like a regional problem, it has unfortunately national implications. San Francisco wields in Washington and has recently emerged as one epicenter of a national conservative successfully eroding progressive victories. A few updates from this column I recently House Speaker Nancy Pelosi's announcement that she plans to remain in Congress while finally fulfilling her promise to allow another (only problematic) member to lead House Democrats. That writing led to with Sabby Sabs from the . In addition to discussing that article, we also examined two others that I published this fall. One of them exposed the use of , while the other examined the indulged by the press. | | ---|---|--- Paid subscribers can access a second interview with the Broken Record Player podcast contrasting the racist and reactionary reality of San Francisco with anachronistic rhetoric about its supposed commitment to progressive principles, before a discussion about a musical revolutionary halfway around the world whose visionary performances 50 years ago have long inspired me. Democrats ' racial hypocrisy points a gun at their own feet One especially crucial result from last month's mid-term congressional election was in Nevada--the state that by securing the Democrats' Senate majority. The youth Latino vote there, skewing well of the Latino electorate elsewhere. That's indescribably fortunate, but carries limited relevance beyond Nevada. Across the country, Latino voters have towards the GOP in recent years, dashing visions for what some (including me) once hoped could be the basis for a permanent Democratic majority. Instead, with having placed a minority of voters in control of a majority of the legislative seats, and the that could effectively allow gerrymandered state legislatures to control state election outcomes, we instead face the real possibility of permanent Republican majorities. The same pattern--communities of color on whom Democrats have long relied for support defecting, or alternatively, declining to vote--also emerges when examining . Herschel Walker forcing a runoff election in Georgia against Sen. Rafael Warnock is a painful omen indicating the GOP's likely strategy going forward: superficial diversity and strategic racial opportunism (encouraged by the hyper-compensation of celebrities, from athletes to musicians, who believe they share class interests with conservative capital). At the same time, the conservative strategy--embraced by Republicans and Democrats alike, from GOP Senate candidates Herschel Walker and Kelly Loeffler to Democratic Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi--also includes demonizing figures who champion racial, economic, reproductive, and climate equity. In Georgia, Sen. Raphael Warnock (D-GA) fended off what he & his campaign described as GOP candidate Loeffler's "" in 2020, only for his ads responding to them to later become the target of compounding disinformation from Walker in . I know that pattern all too well, having myself endured of it at the hands of San Francisco Democrats--including many self-described "progressives" and "socialists"--who enabled Pelosi even while some claimed to oppose many of her policies. While the Senate remains in Democratic hands, the House has shifted to GOP control they could not actualize. That reflects this pattern of Democrats to turn out once reliable bases, particularly across communities of color beyond Nevada. This sad pattern stretches from New England to Los Angeles. Many voices have attributed it to a continuing to show up for the policy priorities of communities of color, or . Yet Again, Democrats Side with Wall Street Before Workers The deference of labor leaders to elected Democrats is painful to witness, especially when those Democrats then labor and again--putting those labor leaders in the awkward position of selling out their rank & file equally often. Having helped force the House to pass the Protecting Right to Organize Act in 2020 after to allow a vote on the bill, it's no surprise to me to watch career & dynasty politicians reveal their true colors. I wish others paid more attention, if only to avoid their own surprise every time this pattern repeats itself. Most recently, Democrats in Washington their Republican colleagues to pass a bill blocking railway workers from striking over long denied demands for paid sick leave. That decision did several things at once: it (1) eroded labor rights established through of organized struggle, (2) undermined public health in the midst of a continuing global pandemic, and (3) paved the path for the return of a Republican to the White House in 2024. First, let's be clear: voting to block a strike is worse than crossing a picket line. Every Democrat who joined Republicans--either overtly, or through their through which some claimed to have shown performative solidarity--should be publicly shamed, and ultimately replaced. Many have attempted lame explanations, while at Republicans. Don't buy it. Kshama Sawant, an elected Seattle Council Member with a proven track record of standing up for the working class, put it in no uncertain terms while addressing the most "progressive" among House Democrats, alongside their enablers in the Dramatic Socialites of America. Public health is among the casualties of Democrats' crass prevarication and dedication to business interests before their own supporters. It has long been shameful that the U.S. any entitlement to paid sick leave as a matter of national policy. It's one reason that America's public health performance is demonstrably among the worst in the world. The proposed strike by railway workers simply sought to leverage collective bargaining principles long established in our country to seek from the market crucial benefits that our government--with the help of Democrats--has long denied. For Congress to go to affirmatively block them from striking is far from neutral. It is an inevitably distributive decision that puts the health and well-being of workers behind corporate profits. Nor was it isolated. Sadly, this is part of a repeating pattern. When labor demanded a long overdue increase in the federal minimum wage, the answer from Congress was . When the economy fell into recession in 2008, homeowners and renters received before a series of repeated (and predictably continuing) targeting . Nor was the latest abdication by Democrats technocratic, or necessary to avert an economic meltdown. Railroads made last year amounting to $20 billion, and enjoy among the of any industry in the country. The cost of workers' demands for paid sick leave, meanwhile, would have been . Much like claims about inflation being driven by higher wages rather than , the rail industry and its defenders claimed that allowing rail workers to exercise their right to strike would create risks to the economy during a crucial time for shipping. All they had to do in order to avert it was invest less than 5% of their profits to satisfy workers' demands. But that was too much for Congress, which bent over backward to insulate the industry from organized labor even at the cost of public health. Even for those Democrats who care neither about labor rights nor public health, the predictable results of last week's sell out should still be cause for alarm. In the same way that Democrats routinely create escalating political risks for themselves by failing to show up for communities of color and alienating voters from them, they do the same by to another of their most crucial bases of once reliable support. As we look forward to the 2024 presidential primary season , one takeaway from last week emerges as especially crucial. Even if you (understandably) don't use Twitter, you can access and share that same post on or . Sharing this article is another way to help erode the political duopoly. Analyses about Democrats abandoning their supporters are sadly accurate--but even they ultimately remain charitable. Beyond selling out labor and the communities of color on whom they rely for support, Democrats have actively weaponized strategic racism to insulate self-serving party leaders from electoral accountability and climb the party ladder. This series will continue with a series of posts examining white supremacy among elected Democrats from Los Angeles to San Francisco and Oakland, as well as the climbing careerists and "journalists" who enable their continuing corruption. In the meantime, paid subscribers can access below a recent interview on the Broken Record Player podcast. The discussion addressed the chasm between San Francisco's progressive reputation and its outrageously racist reality, as well as a discussion about music focused on the life and work of Fela Kuti, the father of afrobeat and among the most committed musical revolutionaries the world has ever seen... Fellow American,

subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6215a07feb944030b3849130b4e36c41&_e=EWps8VTwsd08UrRMx4gLT_igijShWylO3UiGBkmZbIaYUgwaEwAT4m66RTk9PXpgMptL_J6LJE_2f-wKu6Tm1aH4W4e5oBzEa6_DsvmhFL6Drzv2OsS7R_mdWr_rwaBlJnEHgOMrNuGZBMZsqfoaKHkDvgzvUraKcFsnm_UEdhSjwVJntgor_mcSf2Ye-pQxTlhBIxCNrDclzgh2OJZOANcoEcRoCGt1Ryyp-Yq4DEJ8yN_5F_T6OjcGKS9eZtraCjlpbarvMZMnB-mxPIAXyICFB7QcebTvf3ikYBT6pL99ZJQWhbb6ZMVO8Y3z4tHPUcfAGEsS3niLs3uHl9AUeKPFSL32F9l1RfX_7Cpvqu1pT0vHEhcBBpnDx038AZiD)

| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of life's most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **" The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King"** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David's character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we 've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6215a07feb944030b3849130b4e36c41&_e=EWps8VTwsd08UrRMx4gLT_igijShWylO3UiGBkmZbIaYUgwaEwAT4m66RTk9PXpgMptL_J6LJE_2f-wKu6Tm1aH4W4e5oBzEa6_DsvmhFL6Drzv2OsS7R_mdWr_rwaBlJnEHgOMrNuGZBMZsqfoaKHkDvgzvUraKcFsnm_UEdhSjwVJntgor_mcSf2Ye-pQxTlhBIxCNrDclzgh2OJZOANcoEcRoCGt1Ryyp-Yq4DELinxdZ2KcmfJO_TwILSOQNHpxM34g5cDO4vUAVPFlqKAXT8H-caNAGyOstQEysr7fUKlYFJ1sNB1_61tSetPNliZ1xjcWe3gVg6KIa2s50szb2ROR81QExuiWKeLIrb-P0FrCOzNFeeltZeB0UjSPd)** By viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you 'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I was just on stage with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P

| **Peter, President Obama and I were just on the rally stage here in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment. body:

Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020108:JTAKIEGN5:m:1:3331421248:AA4B87D0DBCFA07FFF62B0DB0665AE2F:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020108:JTAKIEGN5:m:1:3331421248:AA4B87D0DBCFA07FFF62B0DB0665AE2F:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020108:JTAKIEGN5:m:1:3331421248:AA4B87D0DBCFA07FFF62B0DB0665AE2F:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in $25, $30, or even $34 for #34.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020108:JTAKIEGN5:m:1:3331421248:AA4B87D0DBCFA07FFF62B0DB0665AE2F:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020108:JTAKIEGN5:m:1:3331421248:AA4B87D0DBCFA07FFF62B0DB0665AE2F:r)

Lindsey Graham

name: B.S.
subject: Folks -- let’s seize this opportunity.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friend -- **Have you heard _Bloomberg_ ’s recent “Downballot Counts” podcast?** AOTL President Kelly Burton joined to talk about how the House will be ‘competitive for the decade’ under new maps.

The new competition is partly because of the democracy-saving work we’ve done in advocating for fair maps. The work continues as our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, supports voters in states like North Carolina and Alabama in U.S. Supreme Court cases.

| | **$25** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, Peter.

Your $25 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 2 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $25 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, Peter: Will you split $25 now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**

**Here's a special link just for you:_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dpg_split_warnock?refcode=20221204.4_RW_A32&amount=25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55542579/381997419/1583625711?refcode=20221204.4_RW_A32&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzk2ODk5Yy0wOTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oA9cEvR9UG7YUsR40qssCl6QVrSIvpwGQIzfrLDIbrM=)_**

Thank you for pitching in, Peter. I truly appreciate your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Title 42 is critical in fighting back, securing our border and keeping out these dangerous substances.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares **

subject: We’re calling an audible 👉

body:
The Left is running the same play AGAIN
|

---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014418:JHcXIEGyN:m:1:3331703221:F8C6294C1432C40C018CA35198A4D042:r)
---

Hey Peter, this is Nikki Haley. Republicans have taken back the House and nearly took control of the Senate. But there's still one race left in 2022: Herschel Walker's runoff election in Georgia. It's 4th, and goal from the one-yard-line, and Herschel Walker has the ball. We need you up there blocking for him to get him into the end zone.

---
| | | [GET HERSCHEL INTO THE END ZONE: FLIP THIS SEAT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014418:JHcXIEGyN:m:1:3331703221:F8C6294C1432C40C018CA35198A4D042:r)
---

The Georgia runoff is less than one week away, and the Left is already lining up its best players to defend against our conservative rush. \- Chuck Schumer
\- Bernie Sanders
\- AOC
\- President Biden They have all already put the full weight of their political machine behind Raphael Warnock, asking their wealthy donors from LA to New York for support. And their top supporters have heeded the call.

We're already behind, and we have just days to make up ground and get out the vote. The Left is already counting on a victory.

Can we count on you to stop them?

---
| | | [GET HERSCHEL INTO THE END ZONE: FLIP THIS SEAT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014418:JHcXIEGyN:m:1:3331703221:F8C6294C1432C40C018CA35198A4D042:r)
---

My very best,
Nikki Haley

And their top supporters have heeded the call. We're already behind, and we have just days to make up ground and get out the vote. The Left is already counting on a victory. Can we count on you to stop them? | | | My very best, Nikki Haley | | | | | Paid for by Stand for America PAC. body:
Democrats like Senator Warnock are our last line of defense against MAGA extremism seeping further into our Senate

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Herschel Walker's election would further mainstream fringe figures who hold racist, misogynist, anti-gay and anti-Semitic views. Do we need 6 extra years of hate being platformed in the Senate? Friends, we do not. Please rush your support to the Warnock campaign so they can get voters to the polls in the runoff election this Tuesday.
body:
Georgia’s ‘Kanye West’
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f3ffd71-dfdd-4647-95d7-484de168766f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The week before Kanye West praised Nazis in an interview with Alex Jones, he had dinner with Donald Trump and a self-declared neo-Nazi. These are the kinds of friends Trump has, and we don’t think he’s trying to convince them of the error of their ways._** _**Trump is also a close friend, political mentor and supporter of Herschel Walker's, who's made numerous despicably anti-Semitic remarks. Trump has repeatedly campaigned for Walker in Georgia’s critical Senate race.**_ | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between six more years of Senator Raphael Warnock ... or Senator-elect Herschel Walker. The December 6th runoff election matters to the whole country._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7926d693-71f1-4867-9e7d-eb5f24edc8fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Walker's election would further mainstream fringe figures who hold racist, misogynist, anti-gay and anti-Semitic views. It'****s becoming a dangerous threat to inspire more violence, of the kind we've seen most recently in Colorado Springs.**_ **_WALKER’S BRAND OF EXTREMISM PUTS ALL OF OUR FAMILIES IN DANGER._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help fight extremism in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25c567cd-caff-4869-9253-a2a66fd4db3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We beat back many of the radicalized figures that Trump elevated from the fringes of US politics in November, candidates such as Kari Lake, Doug Mastriano and Tudor Dixon, to elect Democrats devoted to equality. Now we must do the same to Herschel Walker, so we can keep yet another Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in office, pushing for our goal of full equality for all._** [**_Will you join us in sending Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep Senator Warnock in office and stop hate from having yet another representative in the Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T532ebc06-9426-4eeb-8c72-cdd6ac9b447b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for caring about ALL Americans.**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: John Fetterman
subject: Pennsylvania + Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Take a quick walk down memory lane with me...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221204-8156-header&t=1&akid=8156%2E434096%2E-GNEyy)
Derek, this is the last time I’m going to email you about my friend Rev. Warnocks’ runoff election. **[If you don’t have time to read through this right now, but want to do all you can to protect + expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, please split a donation between me + Rev. Warnock right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221204-1?refcode=em20221204-8156&refcode2=8156_434096_-GNEyy&akid=8156%2E434096%2E-GNEyy)**
Now, take a quick walk down memory lane with me...
Remember about a month ago, when we defeated Dr. Oz + sent him back to New Jersey? Back when our Senate race was record-breakingly expensive + the most expensive in all of 2022?
Well, that record was just broken in Georgia, with spending topping **$380 million** as of last Tuesday. I can only imagine what that number is after these last few days. 😵💫
I bring this up because so many of you graciously stepped up to help us fight back against the GOP + their millions. And now, with Georgia’s runoff just *two days* away, I need you to step up one more time.
**[Will you split a $5 donation right now between me + Rev. Warnock? Your support could help push him over the finish line and expand our Senate majority by one more crucial vote.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221204-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221204-8156&refcode2=8156_434096_-GNEyy&akid=8156%2E434096%2E-GNEyy)**
**[Donate $5 Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221204-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221204-8156&refcode2=8156_434096_-GNEyy&akid=8156%2E434096%2E-GNEyy)**
Thank you for stepping up one more time, Derek.
❤️ John

clean_body: Take a quick walk down memory lane with me... Derek, this is the last time I’m going to email you about my friend Rev. Warnocks’ runoff election. Now, take a quick walk down memory lane with me... Remember about a month ago, when we defeated Dr. Oz + sent him back to New Jersey? Back when our Senate race was record-breakingly expensive + the most expensive in all of 2022? Well, that record was just broken in Georgia, with spending topping $380 million as of last Tuesday. I can only imagine what that number is after these last few days. 😵💫 I bring this up because so many of you graciously stepped up to help us fight back against the GOP + their millions. And now, with Georgia’s runoff just two days away, I need you to step up one more time. Thank you for stepping up one more time, Derek. ❤️ John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of PA U.S. Senator-Elect from Pennsylvania | | ---|---|--- Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Friend, do you have a second?
If we're going to win this critical runoff, we need enough resources to mobilize as many voters as possible across Georgia. **But right now, we're still $1,893 short of tonight's fundraising goal – a goal that we simply cannot afford to miss.**

So far this weekend, your financial support have added more than 2,000 voter contacts that we wouldn't previously had. That is huge! We have 2 more days to get the vote out for the Georgia Runoff and re-elect Senator Warnock. Let's continue to help our volunteers these next 2 days by adding $2,000 more to our Georgia campaign fund. We are all in on Georgia until December 6th. Keep fighting the good fight. Onward, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Young Democrats of America, please .

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. $5 – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today. Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent. | | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Fair Fight
subject: For us, the choice is clear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We need to continue fighting for progress by re-electing Senator Raphael Warnock. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55545910/382042993/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_contrast_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjYzOWY5Ni00NTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feiJCRsJ2CQzamOmitGeJAwGptOIpEikvWLh37Ty8Ig=&emci=f4ddbf8f-4574-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=66639f96-4574-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)

| | Folks, In these next couple of days, voters will choose their next U.S. senator from Georgia. While this Runoff Election won’t decide Senate control, it will decide whether we will continue fighting for progress by re-electing voting rights champion Senator Raphael Warnock, or allow far-right, anti-democracy candidate Herschel Walker to seize power. **And the result of this Runoff Election will determine the strength of our Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. That’s a big deal for how much we can accomplish — because a 50/50 split hasn’t been cutting it.** [**We’re working day and night to re-elect Senator Warnock because he has been delivering for Georgia and the country since day one. Will you chip in $20 or anything you can to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund to power him to victory?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55545911/382042994/147276702?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_contrast_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjYzOWY5Ni00NTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feiJCRsJ2CQzamOmitGeJAwGptOIpEikvWLh37Ty8Ig=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55545912/382042995/147276702?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_contrast_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjYzOWY5Ni00NTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feiJCRsJ2CQzamOmitGeJAwGptOIpEikvWLh37Ty8Ig=)
---
The fact is this: After historic voter turnout in 2020 and 2021, anti-democracy politicians ramped up their voter suppression efforts to stop Georgians from making their voices heard. That’s why the governor pushed for his voter suppression bill SB 202 to limit mail-in voting, impose strict voter ID laws, and shorten voting periods. These are exactly the kind of anti-voter policies that Herschel Walker would support, and exactly what a majority of Georgians do not want.
Senator Warnock, on the other hand, has been leading the charge for voting rights protections in the U.S. Senate, advocating for historic legislation like the Freedom to Vote Act. We need leaders like Senator Warnock in power, who will fight voter suppression and work so every eligible voter is able to cast their ballot as seamlessly as possible — because our vote is our voice, and the ability to use our voice is a matter of human dignity.
[**The choice is clear: We need to re-elect voting rights champion Senator Warnock for another six years. We need to keep Herschel Walker out of office. And we’re working hard to get it done. Please chip in $20 or anything you can to our Georgia Runoff Fund as we mobilize voters to re-elect Senator Warnock in these final two days.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55545913/382042996/147276702?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221204_f_contrast_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjYzOWY5Ni00NTc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feiJCRsJ2CQzamOmitGeJAwGptOIpEikvWLh37Ty8Ig=)

clean_body: We need to continue fighting for progress by re-electing Senator Raphael Warnock. | | | Folks, In these next couple of days, voters will choose their next U.S. senator from Georgia. While this Runoff Election won’t decide Senate control, it will decide whether we will continue fighting for progress by re-electing voting rights champion Senator Raphael Warnock, or allow far-right, anti-democracy candidate Herschel Walker to seize power. And the result of this Runoff Election will determine the strength of our Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. That’s a big deal for how much we can accomplish — because a 50/50 split hasn’t been cutting it. = | = The fact is this: After historic voter turnout in 2020 and 2021, anti-democracy politicians ramped up their voter suppression efforts to stop Georgians from making their voices heard. That’s why the governor pushed for his voter suppression bill SB 202 to limit mail-in voting, impose strict voter ID laws, and shorten voting periods. These are exactly the kind of anti-voter policies that Herschel Walker would support, and exactly what a majority of Georgians do not want. Senator Warnock, on the other hand, has been leading the charge for voting rights protections in the U.S. Senate, advocating for historic legislation like the Freedom to Vote Act. We need leaders like Senator Warnock in power, who will fight voter suppression and work so every eligible voter is able to cast their ballot as seamlessly as possible — because our vote is our voice, and the ability to use our voice is a matter of human dignity. = In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2022 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Peter,

**I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried.**

I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6.

**We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate.**

Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path.

If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill.

We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - _plain and simple._

clean_body: There is no substitute for victory – help Herschel Walker WIN. | Peter, I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried. I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6. We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate. Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path. If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill. We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - plain and simple. If you want to help flip the FINAL Senate race of the year from BLUE to RED, then stop what you're doing and make an immediate contribution RIGHT NOW. 100% of your contribution will go directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign to help him WIN on December 6. In times like these, there is no substitute for victory. This is your opportunity to help Herschel be the conservative fighter we need in Washington. Are you with me? We need to send a powerful message to the radical Left, so I want this email to hit Herschel's MASSIVE fundraising goal by midnight. Herschel is counting on you to help him flip the final Senate seat of 2022 and help Republicans hold onto 50 seats in the United States Senate. There is no room for complacency - liberty hangs in the balance of the actions you take right now. Thank you, Ron DeSantis Governor of Florida | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:

| | | | | Dear Peter, Thanks again for all you've done to fight for democracy this past year. We're so appreciative. I thought I'd share a short newsletter with a few interesting stories worth checking out on this Sunday. Ok, off we go.... ***** **[A short video on the smackdown of Judge Cannon by the 11th Circuit Court.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79338811-3474-4a09-a018-94af78b4d80f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **In trying to protect Trump from consequences of stealing classified docs she undermined legal warrants. The court--2 Trump appointees and a Bushie--[unanimously rebuked her](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2639a20-2755-44e7-983b-36ff07b4d88a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in the language of disdain: **_VIDEO: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xsddAsIzjs4](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35759ced-b5d4-4c42-bc53-7849e23f709f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** * **As the kleptocratic state of Azerbaijan, supported by Putin** in one of his many attempts to sow discord and undermine democracy around the world, attacks innocent Armenians again, [the Genocide Prevention Network made a MUST WATCH video edit to parody Azerbaijan's Bureau of Tourism video](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27c86775-b0df-47f3-bfad-57c5b3dc30c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * You may've witnessed the ugly attempt by washed-up-misogynist Matt Taibbi to run PR for Elon Musk by attacking the then-Biden Campaign for not wanting hacked pics of Hunter Biden's privates on Twitter. Don't trust anything Taibbi says, he's chosen to become Putin/Trump-enabling scum. He's unworthy of wasting one brain cell reading. * If you're in Georgia, make sure to get out and vote tomorrow or Tuesday! If not, you can make virtual calls to turn out voters wherever you are.[ Sign up here!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d2063be-fbb4-4b44-b5f5-4dcb5da57119/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Coming to you live from Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re ready to help re-elect Reverend Warnock to the U.S. Senate.
#
Peter,
This weekend, I’m excited to be visiting Georgia to rally for Senator Raphael Warnock just days out from his critical runoff election on Tuesday.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24249?refcode=em20221204-1920&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1920%2E420207%2En9FL_2)
Peter, the energy here on the ground is great: Georgia voters are fired up and ready to hand Sen. Warnock his first full six-year term in the Senate.
But the GOP is desperately trying to stop our momentum, spending over $58 MILLION in these final days to block our progress and weaken our Democratic Senate majority.
**We can’t afford to lose this seat, which will give Democrats more power in the Senate to pass legislation, appoint judges, and more.** That’s why I’m here in Georgia this final weekend phone banking, knocking doors, and getting out the vote for Rev. Warnock.
It's critical that we keep up this momentum through Election Day on Tuesday. [**Will you donate today so we can keep fighting for Democratic majority in the Senate — starting with Georgia — and building our progressive movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24249?refcode=em20221204-1920&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1920%2E420207%2En9FL_2)
**[Chip in $27 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24249?refcode=em20221204-1920&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1920%2E420207%2En9FL_2)**
We know how close the initial election was in Georgia between Sen. Warnock and Herschel Walker. But we also know exactly how we turned Georgia blue in 2020 and 2021 and how we’ll keep it blue in 2022: grassroots organizing on the ground to mobilize a diverse coalition of voters and get out the vote in record numbers.
But to power Raphael Warnock to victory, we need to make sure we have everything we need so we can move forward on a bold, transformative, and people-first agenda for this country.
[**Will you rush a donation today so we can reach as many voters as possible in the final hours of this critical runoff election and expand our Senate majority?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24249?refcode=em20221204-1920&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1920%2E420207%2En9FL_2)
Let’s do this.
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221204-1920-footer&t=23&refcode2=1920_420207_n9FL_2&akid=1920%2E420207%2En9FL_2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1920%2E420207%2En9FL_2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1920%2E420207%2En9FL_2)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: Herschel Walker Doesn’t Live in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:

Friend, **Herschel Walker’s primary residence is in Texas** , and yet he’s running to represent us here in Georgia.
He said this year that he lives in Texas. He gets a tax break for Texas residents. But he picked up and came to Georgia just to run for Senate.
However, polls show this race is still neck and neck, and while early vote numbers are encouraging, **it’s still anyone’s ballgame**.
Our movement has been fueled by donors like you, who give what they can, so with time running out before our midnight fundraising deadline, we need to ask:

body:
Your contribution will be put to work straight away mobilizing Georgians to the polls and electing Democrats in the months and years to come. | |

Derek, thanks to the support of this grassroots team, I became the first woman elected governor of New York last month. I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done to help elect Democrats like me, but I need your help again. My friend, Senator Raphael Warnock, is headed to a runoff in Georgia in just two days. He’s counting on the same level of dedication and support from you that helped hold the Senate, send me back to the governors’ mansion, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **Before Tuesday’s runoff election, will you split a $10 donation between Senator Warnock’s campaign and the DNC to keep Georgia blue and elect Democrats nationwide?**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Joining me in the promise to reject corporate PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
This week, newly elected Members of Congress have been in Washington for orientation, learning the ins and outs of Congress and getting to know their new colleagues.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=15522%2E3422442%2E6TvmuX)
Derek,
This week, newly elected Members of Congress have been in Washington for orientation, learning the ins and outs of Congress and getting to know their new colleagues.
Thanks to your support, nine(!) Truth to Power candidates are joining me in Washington. **These bold leaders all reject corporate PAC money and will help us stand up to special interests.**
This group includes history-makers, like Maxwell Frost, the first Gen Z Member of Congress. Robert Garcia is the first openly gay immigrant to serve in Congress. And Delia Ramirez and Yadira Caraveo are the first Latinas elected to Congress from their respective states.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14178?refcode=EMAE04_TTP_20221204_V1_F&t=2&akid=15522%2E3422442%2E6TvmuX)
I founded Truth to Power to help elect candidates like these, and I couldn’t be more grateful for your support. **[To help power our movement, consider making a contribution that will be split between my campaign and Truth to Power.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14178?refcode=EMAE04_TTP_20221204_V1_F&t=3&akid=15522%2E3422442%2E6TvmuX)**

clean_body: This week, newly elected Members of Congress have been in Washington for orientation, learning the ins and outs of Congress and getting to know their new colleagues. Derek, This week, newly elected Members of Congress have been in Washington for orientation, learning the ins and outs of Congress and getting to know their new colleagues. Thanks to your support, nine(!) Truth to Power candidates are joining me in Washington. These bold leaders all reject corporate PAC money and will help us stand up to special interests. This group includes history-makers, like Maxwell Frost, the first Gen Z Member of Congress. Robert Garcia is the first openly gay immigrant to serve in Congress. And Delia Ramirez and Yadira Caraveo are the first Latinas elected to Congress from their respective states. I founded Truth to Power to help elect candidates like these, and I couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
